title: AI Movies / Veo 3 + Capcut Video Editor (Full-Time, Remote)
description:
We run multiple fast-growing YouTube channels, and now we’re looking for a person for AI videos. Think of interesting stories or full movies about different things. The videos are being done using new AI tools such as Veo 3 (or seedance).



Example:



(Note: This is not our channel, just an example)



Your job will be simple:

-> You will be assigned a video topic/subnice (eg Fishermen catching big fishes, or Firemen watering down the fire house, or something else)

-> You will be generating video ideas based on your topic (using AI)

-> You will be transforming these ideas into video scenes (using Veo 3)

-> You will be polishing a final version together in a Capcut (or other video editing software)

-> You will be helping to upload videos on YouTube channels and help them to grow



This Job’s For You If:

-> You are passionate about AI + video editing

-> You are looking for a stable job with bonuses (without calls and meetings)

Compensation and Perks:

-> $450-$850/month base salary (adjusted based on quality and consistency)

-> Performance bonuses based on channel growth and engagement (Extra $$$ daily)

-> Fully remote position with an option flexible hours

-> Potential to grow into a lead editor or management role (Higher salary)



Note: Bonuses are based on channel performance. Competitors are getting millions of views with this style of content.

Submit your application here:





If you love Video Editing, and creative work, and want to make content that keeps people watching, apply now!

title: Long-Form VSL Video Editor for Facebook Ads (Direct Response | 10–40 Min VS
description:
We’re looking for a skilled long-form VSL video editor who understands direct response marketing for
 ads and can edit 
–40 minute VSLs as well as short VSLs (3–5 minutes).



This is not typical YouTube editing.

You must understand sales psychology, pacing, and retention for paid traffic.



If you’ve never edited long-form direct response 
 for
 ad funnels, this role is not for you.



Inspiration for the Style We Want



Here is an example of the type of long-form VSL editing style we are looking for:







You should be able to create similar pacing, storytelling, and visual engagement.



What You’ll Be Editing



• Long-form VSLs (10–40 minutes) for
 ad funnels

• Short VSLs (3–5 minutes)

• Advertorial-style videos

• Performance marketing creatives



Typical editing elements include:



• b-roll

• motion graphics

• captions

• charts / visual explanations

• pattern interrupts

• stock footage

• sound design

• pacing optimized for viewer retention and conversions



Requirements



You must have experience editing direct response VSLs used in paid traffic funnels.



You should understand:



• retention pacing

• emotional storytelling

• direct response structure

(hook ? problem ? mechanism ? solution ? proof ? CTA)



Tools typically used:



• Premiere Pro / After Effects / Final Cut

• Motion graphics

• Stock footage sourcing



IMPORTANT — Application Instructions



To apply, you must send:



1?? 1 long-form VSL (10+ minutes) you edited

2?? 1 shorter VSL or ad (3–5 minutes)

3?? The editing software you use



Applications without long-form VSL examples will not be reviewed.

title: Social Media Manager
description:
Social Media 
 (Remote – Philippines)



Location: Remote (Philippines)



Contract: Full-time, contractor basis (home-based)



Working style: 100% remote, with twice-yearly in-person tea
etups (you should be reasonably accessible to Manila for these)



Hours: Full-time, with overlap required with UK working hours for collaboration



About Kitto



Kitto is a specialist marketing and branding agency working exclusively within the recruitment industry. We partner with recruitment businesses around the world to help them stand out through strategic, creative marketing — spanning employer brand, content, campaigns, design, video, animation, and copywriting.



We operate as a fully remote global team, collaborating across time zones to deliver high-quality creative work that makes recruitment brands feel more human, more credible, and more impactful.



The Role



We’re looking for a Social Media Manager to lead and level up social for Kitto and support social delivery across a selection of client accounts.



This is not a “just schedule posts” job. You’ll be responsible for shaping social direction, building content plans, improving performance, and making sure our channels (and our clients’) show up consistently, confidently, and creatively — especially on LinkedIn, with support across Instagram and TikTok.



You’ll work closely with strategists, copywriters, designers, and account leads, and you’ll be a key part of our growing Philippines-based team function.



What You’ll Do



Social Strategy & Planning

- Own and evolve the social media approach for Kitto (and selected clients): positioning, content pillars, formats, and channel plans.

- Translate campaign and brand strategy into practical, platform-native content plans.

- Build and manage content calendars that balance consistency, creativity, and commercial impact.



Content Creation & Copy

- Create and oversee engaging, on-brand content across LinkedIn, Instagram, and TikTok (posts, carousels, short-form video, stories/reels).

- Write smart, personality-filled copy tailored to platform, audience, and brand voice.

- Brief designers and creatives clearly (and jump in to create yourself when needed using Canva/CapCut/Adobe Express-level tools).



Publishing, Community & Engagement

- Manage publishing schedules and ensure content goes out on time, with quality control.

- Proactively engage with followers, communities, and relevant conversations to build visibility and trust.

- Spot and respond to trends early — turning insights into content ideas, not just observations.



Performance & Optimisation

- Track and report performance (reach, engagement, follower growth, clicks/leads where relevant).

- Turn data into actions: testing formats, improving hooks, refining messaging, and making recommendations.

- Share regular performance updates internally (and with clients when applicable), including what’s working and what to try next.



Collaboration & Delivery

- Work closely with account leads and the wider team to bring campaigns to life across social.

- Support content shoots/interviews remotely (and occasionally help plan what’s needed to get strong social cut-downs).

- Communicate clearly, flag blockers early, and manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced agency environment.



This Role Suits Someone Who…

- Has 3–5+ years experience managing social media (agency, in-house, or freelance), with clear examples of results.

- Is confident owning social strategy and executing the work (not one without the other).

- Can write sharp, conversational copy — especially for LinkedIn — and understands what makes content perform.

- Understands the difference between “posting content” and “building a social presence.”

- Is organised, dependable, and comfortable juggling multiple accounts and timelines.

- Communicates clearly in English (written and spoken) and collaborates well across time zones.

- Has strong creative judgement and a point of view — but isn’t ego-driven.

- Enjoys experimenting, learning, and improving performance through iteration.



Tools & Platforms



Required

- LinkedIn (advanced understanding), plus
, X, Instagram and TikTok

- Scheduling tools and content calendars (you don’t need to be loyal to one tool — just competent)

- Canva + basic short-form video editing tools (CapCut and/or Adobe Express level)

- Strong working knowledge of analytics/insights and reporting



Desirable

- Experience supporting employer brand, recruitment marketing, or B2B social

- Basic paid social understanding (boosting, targeting, campaign basics)

- Experience briefing creatives (design/video) for social-first execution



What We Offer

- Fully remote working (Philippines-based)

- Structured contractor engagement with paid public holidays, annual leave, and sick leave entitlement

- A collaborative, supportive team environment with mentoring and professional support

- Exposure to a wide variety of global recruitment brands and creative projects

- Opportunities to develop across strategy, campaigns, and emerging tools

- Twice-yearly in-person Phillipines tea
et-ups for collaboration and celebrations



Kitto is committed to maintaining fair and transparent holiday and sickness policies that support work/life balance and wellbeing across our global team.

title: Multi-Channel Outreach & Campaign Executive (Email, LinkedIn & WhatsApp) - UK Recruitment Market
description:
We are a UK-based specialist recruitment agency operating within healthcare, mental health, housing, and substance misuse sectors.  



We are hiring a structured, commercially minded Outreach Executive to run multi-channel campaigns 
, LinkedIn, and WhatsApp) and generate qualified booked calls for our directors.



This is a performance-driven role focused on pipeline generation — not general administration.



Key Responsibilities  

- Build segmented outreach lists from our CRM 

- Run structured campaigns with follow-up sequences, that include:  LinkedIn outreach (sales navigator & (connection requests + follow-up messaging), Send compliant and professional WhatsApp outreach messages , and
 campaigns!

- Track open rates, reply rates, and response quality  

- Identify qualified prospects and book calls into the director’s diary

- Maintain accurate CRM notes and tagging  

- Continuously optimise subject lines and messaging  



Channels You Will Manage  



 Campaigns

- Multi-step sequences

- Candidate reactivation

- Market insight campaigns



LinkedIn Outreach

- Personalised connection requests  

- Structured follow-up messaging  

- Re-engagement of warm contacts  



WhatsApp Outreach

- Professional follow-up to engaged contacts  

- Re-activation of warm candidates  

- Appointment confirmation and reminders  



All outreach must remain professional, concise, and aligned with UK recruitment standards.

title: WordPress Developer (Breakdance + Headspin)
description:
Project role with potential long term position



We are a premium UK property company looking for a skilled WordPress developer to help restructure and standardise our website.



Our website is already live and built in WordPress using Breakdance and Headspin. We now have a new design ready, and the first phase of this role is to implement that design and bring consistency to the entire site both frontend and backend.



This role starts as a defined project, but if the collaboration works well it may develop into a long term development role including automation, integrations and system development.



Project Overview



Our website currently contains many pages built using Wordpress/Breakdance and Headspin, but pages were created over time and now need to be standardised.



Your first task will be to:



• Implement a new design across the website

• Standardise layouts and templates in Breakdance

• Organise and clean up Headspin components

• Ensure the entire system is structured and consistent

• Improve responsiveness and layout quality

• Ensure everything is maintainable moving forward



The goal is to turn the site into a clean, structured and scalable system.



Responsibilities



You will:



• Implement supplied designs across our existing WordPress site

• Rebuild layouts using Breakdance builder

• Create reusable templates and components

• Standardise styling using Headspin

• Improve responsiveness across devices

• Clean up inconsistent layouts and structures

• Ensure strong performance and maintainability



You should be comfortable reviewing an existing site structure and improving it methodically.



Technical Requirements



You must have strong experience with:



WordPress Development



• WordPress architecture

• Theme and template structure

• Performance optimisation



Breakdance Builder



• Building templates and layouts

• Reusable components and sections

• Clean page builder structure



Headspin Framework



• Design system structure

• Consistent component styling



Front End Development



• User Interfaces

• HTML

• CSS

• JavaScript



You should write clean, structured and maintainable code within Wordpress/Breakdance.



SEO and Performance Knowledge



You must understand how development affects SEO and performance.



Important areas include:



• Semantic HTML structure

• Page speed optimisation

• Mobile performance

• Core Web Vitals awareness

• Clean heading hierarchy

• Structured page layouts



The goal is a fast, search engine friendly website.



Working Structure



You will work directly with the CEO, who built and manages the current website structure.



Because of this, it is important that you can:



• Analyse an existing WordPress setup

• Ability to retain existing SEO with the new design

• Understand how the system currently works

• Identify inconsistencies and structural issues

• Implement improvements in an organised way



You should be comfortable reviewing and improving an existing architecture rather than starting from scratch.



Clear communication and attention to detail are important.



Future Opportunities



If the first phase goes well, the role may expand into ongoing development work including:



• WordPress feature development

• System integrations

• Automation workflows

• AI assisted tools and infrastructure



We are exploring tools such as:



• OpenClaw

• n8n automation

• Custom integrations



This role could grow into a long term technical position within our development ecosystem.



Ideal Candidate



You are someone who:



• Writes clean and organised code

• Understands structured systems

• Has strong attention to detail

• Communicates clearly in English

• Takes pride in producing high quality work



You enjoy turning messy systems into clean scalable platforms.



We are looking for a high quality developer.



To Apply



Please include:



• Links to WordPress websites you have built

• Examples of Breakdance work if available

• Your experience with CSS and JavaScript

• Your availability for this project



Please begin your application with the words:



Structure first



This helps us filter automated responses.

title: Virtual Assistant & Video Editor - YouTube (Long-Form)
description:
About the Role:

We're running multiple YouTube channels and need a reliable, task-oriented VA to help with repetitive production work. This isn't a creative role—we have systems in place for everything. Your job is to follow instructions, execute tasks efficiently, and help us scale.



What You'll Do:

- Possibly create thumbnails using our process

- Other production tasks as needed (everything has clear instructions)



What We're Looking For:

- Task-oriented and organized: you love completing work efficiently

- Strong at following instructions: if there's an SOP, you follow it

- Good English (written and verbal)

- Hardworking and reliable: we need consistency

- Available full-time, Monday-Saturday

- Editing skills are a bonus but NOT required (we'll teach you our simple workflow)

- Month 2+: Around $500/month (based on workload and performance)

- Long-term: As we hire more people, you'll have first opportunity for team lead/management roles

Why This Role Matters:

You're our first hire. If you prove to be reliable and understand what we need, you won't just be doing tasks forever—you'll help us build and manage the team as we scale.



How to Apply:

- Send your resume

What makes you good at following instructions and staying organized?

Starting ASAP - hiring 1 VA within the next week.

title: Meta Ads & Creative Specialist VA – Facebook/Instagram Campaigns & Creatives (E-commerce Wellness Project)
description:
We’re running a fast-moving e-commerce launch for wellness/supplement products (targeting women 35–55 with weight loss/menopause focus). We need a skilled Meta Ads Specialist to take full ownership of
 & Instagram ad campaigns: setup, targeting, creative production, testing, optimization, and daily performance management. You’ll run the traffic engine independently after initial handover, delivering leads for owner to close via WhatsApp. Goal: High ROAS (return on ad spend) with low-risk creatives that avoid platform flags.

Key Responsibilities



Build, launch, and manage Meta ad campaigns 
 & Instagram) using Ads Manager/Business Suite.

Define & refine audiences: Women 35–55, interests (weight loss, menopause, wellness, Ozempic alternatives, fitness after 40), behaviors, lookalikes from pixel data.

Create & refresh ad creatives: Use Canva to design images (before/after transformations, urgency overlays), short videos if possible, write compelling copy (emotional hooks, testimonials, scarcity). Produce 5–10 variations per test.

Run A/B tests: Low-budget daily tests ($20–$50/day initially), analyze results (clicks, CPC, CTR, conversions), scale winners, pause losers fast.

Set up & monitor pixel/events for tracking (views, add-to-cart, leads).

Optimize daily: Adjust bids, budgets, placements, targeting based on data.

Report simply: Daily/weekly Google Sheet updates (spend, ROAS, leads generated, top creatives).

Light organic support: If experienced, post subtle seeding/comments on relevant Reddit subs (follow strict guidelines to avoid bans).

Follow provided guidelines: Avoid direct drug/medical claims in ads/copy to reduce ban risk.



Required Skills & Experience



1–2+ years hands-on experience managing Meta 
 & Instagram) ad campaigns (e-commerce, lead gen, or wellness preferred).

Proficient in Meta Business Suite/Ads Manager, pixel setup, audience targeting, A/B testing, scaling.

Strong Canva skills (or basic Photoshop) for quick ad image/copy creation.

Solid English communication (written reports, clear updates).

Data-driven mindset: Comfortable analyzing metrics and making optimization decisions.

Reliable internet, quiet workspace, backup power (common in PH).

Honest, proactive, and able to work independently with minimal supervision once trained.

Bonus: Experience with Reddit/social seeding, lookalike audiences, or running urgency/FOMO campaigns.



What We Offer



Weekly payments on time.

Clear templates, targeting lists, ad guidelines, and training handover (I’ll share everything needed to run autonomously).

Opportunity for more hours/pay if you deliver strong ROAS in first 2 weeks.

Long-term role if it’s a great fit.

Direct owner communication (no agency layers).



How to Apply

Reply with:



Your full name & OnlineJobs.ph profile link (or resume/portfolio link).

Short intro: Why are you a strong fit for Meta ads + creative production in e-commerce/wellness?

Your hourly rate expectation ($8–$12 range).

Years of experience specifically with Meta ads (campaign management, not just general social).

Attach 2–3 screenshots/examples of past Meta ad campaigns/creatives you’ve created or managed (blur any sensitive/client info; show targeting, copy, images, performance if possible).

Your typical availability (hours/day, timezone) and if you can overlap with Thailand evenings for quick chats.



Serious applicants only – top candidates will get a quick paid test task ($30–$50, e.g., “Set up a mock campaign for women 35–55 wellness audience + create 3 ad variations”). We respond within 24 hours.

Looking forward to your application!

Thomas

description:

We own and operate multiple companies in the real estate space, including SEO for Real Estate Investors, a platform that helps investors generate high-quality seller leads organically, and Grumpy Hare Hosting, which provides website hosting and templates for real estate professionals.

Marketing drives our growth, and we’re looking for a talented PPC Specialist to help us expand into YouTube and Google Ads while optimizing our existing lead generation strategies. Our teams are collaborative, fun, and growth-focused—we support one another to create, innovate, and thrive together.



Role Overview

We are seeking an experienced PPC Specialist to manage and optimize our paid advertising efforts across YouTube and Google Ads. In this role, you will design, implement, and optimize campaigns that generate high-quality leads while maximizing ROI.

You will work closely with our marketing and creative teams to ensure all campaigns align with our brand messaging and overall marketing strategy.



Key Responsibilities

- Campaign Management: Create, manage, and optimize YouTube and Google Ads campaigns

- Strategy Development: Build comprehensive PPC strategies targeting the right audiences with the right messaging

- Budget Management: Allocate and optimize ad spend for maximum ROI

- Performance Tracking: Monitor KPIs, analyze data, and provide actionable insights

- A/B Testing: Test ad creatives, copy, and targeting to improve campaign performance

- Audience Targeting: Use advanced targeting methods to reach the most relevant prospects

- Ad Scheduling: Implement and optimize ad schedules for maximum reach

- Competitor & Industry Analysis: Stay informed on industry trends and competitor activities

- Compliance: Ensure all campaigns follow platform policies and advertising guidelines

- Collaboration: Work closely with marketing and creative teams to maintain consistent brand alignment



Qualifications

- Minimum 3 years of experience managing Google Ads, YouTube Ads and
 Ads

- Proven track record of lead generation and ROI optimization

- Strong analytical skills with a data-driven mindset

- Excellent project management and organizational skills

- Creative thinker with the ability to test, iterate, and innovate

- Strong communication and collaboration skills

- Up to date with PPC trends, tools, and best practices



Why Work With Us?

- Competitive salary with room for financial growth

- Opportunity to learn and work across multiple platforms and industries

- A culture built on teamwork, creativity, and growth

- A supportive environment where your ideas matter

- Clear opportunities for advancement as we scale



How to Apply

Please send the following to 

- Your updated resume

- Your portfolio

- Your OnlineJobsPH (OLJ) profile link



Please include “PPC Specialist” in the subject line.



NOTE: Applications missing any of the above requirements will not be reviewed.

title: Copywriter
description:
About Us: GrumpyHare is a growing hosting company helping real estate investors succeed online with high performance websites. We recently launched our Done For You services, focused on simple, effective SEO strategies that attract motivated seller leads and drive organic growth. Our mission is to deliver clean, ethical SEO solutions that build long lasting results while protecting our clients' credibility and online reputation.



Role Overview: We’re looking for an experienced copywriter who thrives in a fast-paced, detail-oriented environment. In this role, you'll write and edit SEO optimized content that reflects our clients’ brand voice and supports their business goals with the Real Estate Investing world. You must have a strong understanding of content strategy, on-page SEO, excellent writing and grammar skills, and a passion for delivering polished, client-ready work.



Key Responsibilities:

- Write engaging, high-quality content for websites and blogs that are SEO focused within the real estate investing space

- Edit and proofread content for clarity, consistency, and alignment with brand guidelines

- Collaborate with your manager, the SEO team, web build team and the DFY manager to ensure all content meets strategic goals and SEO best practices

- Apply SEO principles, including keyword research, writing metadata, and internal linking

- Review content for grammar, tone, structure, and keyword use before final delivery

- Manage multiple client projects while staying on deadline

- Stay up to date with SEO trends and Google algorithm updates



Qualifications

- 5 or more years of professional copywriting experience, ideally in real estate, digital marketing, or SEO

- Exceptional writing, editing, and proofreading skills

- Strong understanding of SEO best practices and on-page optimization

- Excellent communication skills with the ability to adapt tone and style

- Comfortable using Google Docs, WordPress, and basic HTML

- Experience with project management platforms like 
, Asana, or Trello

- Self motivated, organized, and comfortable working remotely



Why Join Us?

- Join a team passionate about ethical, simple SEO practices.

- Use your skills to make a visible impact with minimal complexity.

- Thrive in a supportive, collaborative environment.



How to Apply:

Send the following to Ria at 
 CC

- A portfolio showcasing your sample write-ups

Please include "Copywriter” in the subject line.

Thank you and we can’t wait to hear from you!

title: Female Customer Service Representative and Dispatcher
description:
Hello and welcome!



We’re a family-owned business looking for an outgoing, positive, and engaged individual seeking a long-term employment opportunity—with room to grow and earn more. We are currently hiring for a female dispatcher role.



If you're interested, please send a 1-minute video introducing yourself in a professional context. Share your experience in previous roles and the types of jobs you’ve held. You must have excellent English communication skills (C2 level) and sound like you're from the U.S.

mber to support our brand’s growth across digital and offline channels. You will play a key role in processing POs, coordinating marketing campaigns, managing events, and driving strategies that connect with our beauty brand presence.

Benefits:

title: E-commerce Ad Creative Designer (Images + Video)
description:
Meta Ads Creative Designer & Video Editor (Image + Short-Form Video) – Streetwear Jewelry Brand (Warpedsense®)



About Warpedsense®

Warpedsense® is a fast-growing, genderless/unisex jewelry brand inspired by streetwear, internet culture, and bold, unique aesthetics.



Our pieces stand out with unusual shapes, rich textures, and edgy details – visuals that demand attention in ads. We sell online across Europe (core market: Germany) and the USA, backed by 50k+ Instagram followers and live Meta campaigns that drive real revenue.



We're searching for a talented, fast-moving creative to craft scroll-stopping ads that convert – and grow alongside us.



Your Role

Work directly with the founder to:

- Research trends & winning ads

- Ideate powerful hooks

- Produce high-performing static image ads + short-form video ads for Meta 
 & Instagram)



Focus: Create multiple variations fast for A/B testing, transforming raw product shots into high-converting creatives.



Key Responsibilities

- Research top-performing ads in jewelry, fashion, streetwear, and direct-response (Meta, TikTok etc.)

- Brainstorm creative concepts & hooks aligned with our style

- Design static image ads (Photoshop/Canva) – macro shots, textures, modern layouts

- Edit short-form videos/Reels (CapCut) – hooks, transitions, text, music sync

- Deliver 5–15+ variations per concept (layouts, copy, formats) for rapid testing

- Support sourcing, organizing & maintaining our creative asset library

- Daily communication via Slack – quick, clear feedback loops



Our Visual Style

- Dark, moody, clean aesthetics

- Unusual jewelry shapes & bold textures (strong macro/close-up focus)

- High-contrast, minimal yet striking compositions

- Streetwear + internet-culture vibe – edgy, modern, authentic



Requirements

- Proven experience in social media/image ads or Meta creatives

- Strong skills in short-form video editing (TikTok/Reels/Ads style)

- Proficient in CapCut (must-have for fast edits)

- Solid knowledge of Photoshop, Canva or similar tools

- Ability to research ads and spot performance drivers (CTR, conversions)

- Excellent written & spoken English

- High attention to detail + quick turnaround

- Reliable, proactive, and passionate about e-commerce growth



Big Bonus Points If You Have

- Experience with e-commerce or product-focused brands (jewelry/fashion ideal)

- Hands-on with AI creative tools (Midjourney, Flux, RunwayML etc.) for rapid ideation

- Knowledge of direct-response / Meta ad best practices

- Portfolio with high-converting ads or streetwear-style content



Tools We Use

- CapCut (main video tool)

- Photoshop / Canva / AI tools

- Slack (daily communication)

- Google Drive / asset libraries



Workload & Schedule

- Part-time: 20–30 hours per week (flexible hours)

- Good overlap with European time zones preferred

- Long-term role with potential to increase hours or take on more responsibility as we scale



Compensation

$1,000 – $1,400 USD per month (depending on experience, skills, and proven results)

+ Performance bonuses for creatives that scale or outperform benchmarks



How to Apply

To show you've read this fully, start your message with: WARPED



Then include:

1. 1–2 examples of static image ads or short videos you've created (or ones you rate highly)

2. Short explanation: Why do they work? (hooks, visuals, conversion potential)

3. Your portfolio link (Behance, Instagram, Drive etc.)

4. Your expected rate within our range + your availability (hours/week)



We're genuinely excited to see your work – only serious, creative applicants, please!

description:

title: Google Ads Manager
description:
Google Ads Specialist (Long-Term | Client-Facing | Strategy + Setup | White Label for UK Agency)



 Job Description



We are a growing UK-based paid ads agency looking for a highly skilled Google Ads Specialist to manage client accounts and help us scale.



We already have our first Google Ads client ready to launch.



We need someone who can:



• Build and structure accounts from scratch

• Conduct keyword research based on budget

• Create a clear campaign plan of action

• Set up full tracking (GA4, GTM, conversions, call tracking if needed)

• Write high-converting ad copy

• Optimise weekly

• Communicate professionally with clients via
 (cc’ing the agency owner)

• Provide structured weekly optimisation reports

• Help set up our own Google Ads account to generate more clients for this service



The agency owner will handle all video calls and strategy calls.

You will handle the execution and technical delivery.



This is a long-term role with growth potential.



???? Important: This Is Not For Beginners



You MUST:



• Be confident building accounts from zero

• Understand match types and intent

• Know when to use Manual CPC vs Smart Bidding

• Be able to explain your strategy clearly

• Be comfortable diagnosing high CPL issues

• Have strong English written communication



If you just “set up campaigns and let Google optimise” — this role is not for you.



We are looking for a strategist, not a button pusher.



???? Your Responsibilities



1?? Client Account Setup

– Full keyword research

– Campaign structure based on budget

– Negative keyword planning

– Conversion tracking setup

– GA4 + GTM configuration

– Extensions and ad assets



2?? Ongoing Management

– Weekly optimisation

– Search term mining

– Bid adjustments

– Ad testing

– Budget reallocation

– Performance diagnostics



3?? Reporting 
-Based)

Each week you will send:



• Spend

• Leads

• Cost per lead

• What was optimised

• What is being tested next

• Recommendations



4?? Internal Growth Support

You will also help build and optimise our own Google Ads account to attract more clients.



???? Required Experience



• Minimum 3 years managing Google Ads

• Experience with lead generation campaigns

• Experience setting up conversion tracking manually

• Experience using GA4 and Google Tag Manager

• Strong understanding of search intent

• Ability to explain strategy clearly



Bonus if you have:

• Agency experience

• Experience with UK or European markets

• Experience working white-label



???? Pay Structure



We prefer a fixed monthly rate per account.



Please apply with:



• Your monthly rate per account

• Your hourly rate (if applicable)

• Case studies or results

• Screenshots of accounts you’ve managed (remove client names if needed)



This is long-term work for the right person.



???? IMPORTANT – To Apply



In your application:



1?? Explain how you would structure a £1,500/month lead generation campaign.

2?? Explain your full tracking setup process from scratch.

3?? Tell us about a campaign that failed and what you did to fix it.

4?? Start your message with the word “STRATEGY” so we know you read everything.



Applications without this will be ignored.

title: DTC CREATIVE EDITOR
description:
We are looking for a proactive Creative Editor who can support creative strategy and own execution of Terra’s content across Meta, Tiktok and Instagram - primarily short-form video. 



You will be responsible for turning raw footage and material into high-quality content that stops the scroll for football fans and fashion-forward consumers alike. We value standards over volume — we'd rather publish three pieces that hit than ten that dilute the brand.



You will work closely with the co-founders in a close-knit, fast moving team - collaborating on creative direction while being trusted to operate independently, edit at pace, and maintain high standards on all content.



Core Responsibilities



- Creative Execution: Edit and deliver high-quality short-form video ads and organic content across Meta, TikTok, and Instagram 

- Creative Research: Stay ahead of platform trends, competitor creative, and football culture 
nts. Surface opportunities before they're obvious, bring references, angles, and ideas proactively.

- Hook Development: Contribute hook variations and opening concepts for every brief. The first 3 seconds d
 everything — you bring ideas and instinct to the table, not just executions.

- Iteration & Testing: Work within a test-learn-iterate loop alongside the founders to identify highest-performing angles, formats, and hooks. Each round of ads informs the next — you flag what's working, suggest what to test, and evolve your approach based on real performance data.

- Brand Consistency: Every piece of content — paid or organic — must reflect Terra's visual identity, cultural references, and tone. You are a guardian of the standard, not just an executor of briefs.

title: SEO Account Manager(Agency Experience)
description:
We're looking for a Senior SEO Specialist to join our growing Australian digital agency. We're after someone who lives and breathes SEO and at a broader level digital marketing, who is passionate about delivering great results and top-notch service to clients. You will be working with a team of highly experienced SEO practitioners servicing clients predominantly in Australia but also in the US. While this is a remote team there’ll be constant interaction with the rest of the team based in Australia but also colleagues in the Philippines. The hours of operation will be aligned with Australian Eastern Standard Time.



Area Ten is a global digital agency that services large corporates to fast-growing upstarts across Australia, Asia, and North America. One of the keys to our success lies in the quality of our staff. We have a strict policy of no junior staff which means you’ll be working with the highest caliber of colleagues in the industries, hence there is a scope for ample opportunities to learn and develop.



We are looking for someone who's highly analytical with hands-on technical SEO experience. Do not apply if you have just been doing link-building or SEO content writing. We need someone with at least 5 years of hands-on technical onsite SEO experience, ideally working on multiple sites at the same time in an agency environment. You need to have extensive experience working with GA as well as setting up and maintaining Data Studio Reports.



To be considered for this role you need to pass an Excel test which will test your data analysis skills.





The Role:



*Driving and assisting in executing on-site SEO programs for clients across multiple industries and geographies

*Analyzing client performance to gain insight into the health of an SEO program and to identify opportunities for improvement

*Staying abreast of industry trends and innovations to work out how they can be applied across our customers

*Communicating with clients and internal stakeholders to ensure that SEO services are delivered in a timely and consistent manner



What we are looking for:



*A minimum of 5, ideally 10+ years of experience implementing successful SEO projects in an agency environment with larger clients i.e. that spend over $5K a month

*Should have spent the last 3 years at a digital, preferably SEO agency

*Highly analytical and data-driven

*Fluent written and verbal English skills

*Ability to work autonomously

*Strong attention to detail

*Strong work ethic, disciplined and rigorous with a process-oriented approach

*Good sense of humour



How to apply



To apply for this job,



Please send your up-to-date resume and the results of an internet speed test with the subject line ATSEO240621B, to 
 do NOT apply for this role directly by clicking the “Apply” button.

title: We're Looking for a Meta Ads Media Buyer
description:
1. Who we are & why we're hiring



We're a marketing agency specialized in paid advertising for service-based businesses.



Paid ads are at the core of our clients' growth strategies, and campaign performance plays a decisive role in the results we deliver.



We're expanding our media buying team and are looking for someone capable of managing and optimizing paid campaigns while also supporting some of the operational tasks related to our advertising systems.



2. Quick practical overview



Role: Meta Ads Media Buyer

Location: 100% Remote



3. What you'll be responsible for



Your core responsibility will be managing and improving paid advertising campaigns for our clients.



This includes:



- Launching, managing, and optimizing Meta Ads campaigns 
 & Instagram)

- Monitoring campaign performance and making data-driven optimizations

- Testing audiences, creatives, hooks, and campaign structures

- Scaling campaigns that show strong performance

- Working with creative strategists and designers to improve ad performance



In addition to media buying, you will also support the operational side of our advertising systems when needed. This may include:



- Managing campaign-related workflows inside GoHighLevel (GHL)

- Updating pipelines, leads, or campaign data when necessary

- Organizing tasks and projects inside Asana

- Structuring and documenting the company's processes

- Supporting the team with light operational tasks linked to advertising campaigns



Important note:

Media buying is the primary responsibility of this role. The operational tasks simply support the execution and organization of campaigns.



4. What we expect from you



We're looking for someone who:



- Has real hands-on experience running Meta Ads campaigns

- Understands key performance metrics such as CPA, CPL, CTR, and conversion rate

- Is comfortable analyzing campaign data and making optimization decisions

- Communicates clearly and respects deadlines

- Is organized and able to manage multiple campaigns



You should also be comfortable working inside tools like GoHighLevel, Asana, or similar systems as part of the daily workflow.



Experience matters, but ownership and accountability matter just as much.



5. What you can expect from us



From our side, you can expect:



- Clear campaign objectives and expectations

- Direct and constructive feedback

- A structured working environment

- Collaboration with creatives, strategists, and operations

- The opportunity to manage real ad budgets and scale campaigns



For the right person, there is potential for long-term collaboration within our media buying team.



6. Who this is (and isn't) for



This role is a good fit if you:



- Have real experience running Meta Ads

- Enjoy improving campaign performance through testing and optimization

- Are comfortable working with structured processes and systems

- Are organized and proactive



This role is not a good fit if you:



- Have only theoretical knowledge of advertising

- Have never managed real ad budgets

- Prefer purely administrative work

- Are looking for simple operational tasks rather than performance responsibility



We are looking for a media buyer first. Someone capable of handling the operational side when needed.



7. Attention check



Important:



To make sure you've read the full job post, include the word BANANA in the first line of your application.



Applications without this word will not be considered.



8. How to apply



To apply, please send:



- A short introduction about yourself

- Your experience with Meta Ads

- Examples of campaigns you have managed (results, industries, budgets, etc.)

- Any portfolio, case studies, or relevant work



We're mainly looking for people who are serious about performance marketing and paid advertising.



Looking forward to hearing from you.

title: Customer Support VA (Email Support for E-commerce Store | Part-Time | Long-Term)

s

 templates to resolve common issues

s into the correct folders

• Logging return and refund cases in our support log

• Contacting our supplier for order updates when needed

All workflows are documented in clear SOPs and training videos, so you will always know exactly what to do.

 

Language Requirements

Our store currently operates in the Norwegian market, so customer communication must always be sent in Norwegian.



You do not need to speak Norwegian.



All internal communication, SOPs, and templates are written in English.

You will simply translate the response into Norwegian using tools such as:

• ChatGPT

• DeepL

Accuracy and attention to detail when translating messages is important.

 

Tools We Use

You will work with the following tools:

• Hostinger
 (support inbox)

• Shopify (orders and refunds)

• Google Docs (SOPs &
 templates)

• Google Sheets (support log)

• WhatsApp (supplier communication)

• ChatGPT

• DeepL (or other translation tool)

In the future we may transition to a ticketing system such as Freshdesk or Gorgias as the business grows.

 

Working Hours

• Approximately 2–3 hours per day

• Flexible schedule

• Preference for some overlap with European time zones

• All
s must be responded to within 24 hours

 

Requirements

We are looking for someone who is:

• Fluent in written English

• Organized and detail-oriented

• Comfortable following structured processes

• Experienced with customer support

• Reliable and consistent

• Comfortable using translation tools

• Shopify experience



Important:

This role requires following systems and procedures, not creating new solutions.

 

Nice to Have

• Experience with e-commerce customer support

• Experience using Shopify

• Experience with helpdesk or ticket systems

 

Compensation

• Competitive hourly rate based on experience

• Long-term opportunity

• Potential performance bonuses

• Opportunity to grow with the company

 

How to Apply

To apply, please include the following:

1. A short introduction about yourself

2. Your experience with customer support

3. Your hourly rate

4. Your internet speed

5. Your experience with Shopify 

Please also start your application with the word "Avocado" so we know you read the full job description.

Also confirm that you are comfortable translating customer messages into Norwegian using translation tools.

title: Etsy / Shopify POD VA – Custom & Personalized Products (Customily Experience Preferred)
description:

The ideal candidate has strong experience working with Print-on-Demand (POD) providers and tools such as Customily, and understands how to build and manage high-converting personalized product listings.

This role is perfect for someone who already has experience working with Etsy-style custom products such as personalized gifts, custom apparel, custom jewelry, pet portraits, name products, etc.



Responsibilities

• Work with POD providers to set up products and fulfillment workflows

• Coordinate with graphic designers to create high-quality product mockups and designs

• Upload and organize product designs, templates, and variants

• Ensure personalization previews work correctly on the storefront

• Help optimize listings for conversion and user experience



Requirements



• Experience working with Print-on-Demand providers (Printify, Printful, ShineOn, CustomCat, etc.)

• Experience using Customily or other personalization apps

• Strong attention to detail

Big Plus (Preferred but not required)



• Experience creating product mockups and graphics

• Experience managing graphic designers for custom product creation

• Experience launching or managing Etsy personalized product stores



What We Are Building



We are building a large personalized product catalog similar to successful Etsy shops, but on our Shopify store.



Examples include:



Personalized gifts

Custom name products

Pet products

Family gifts

Custom apparel



To Apply

Examples of personalized products or stores you have worked on

Which POD providers you have used

Your experience with Customily or personalization apps

title: MEDIA BUYER (DTC/E-commerce)
description:
We’re looking for a Media Buyer to manage and optimize paid advertising campaigns for DTC clients. You’ll focus on driving results through structured execution, testing, and quick iteration across Meta Ads, while collaborating with creative and analytics teams. This is a fully remote role with flexible hours.



Responsibilities



- Own end-to-end paid acquisition strategy and execution across Meta Ads to hit CPA/ROAS and revenue targets.

- Build scalable account structures, audiences, and test roadmaps that move from learning to profitable scale quickly.

- Manage multiple client accounts concurrently, prioritizing high-impact actions and speed without sacrificing rigor.

- Design and run creative, offer, and landing-page experiments; analyze results and scale winners decisively.

- Implement and maintain accurate conversion tracking and attribution; ensure clean data from click to sale to LTV.

- Forecast, allocate, and pace budgets; identify inefficiencies and reallocate spend to highest-ROI opportunities.

- Collaborate closely with funnel, creative, and analytics specialists to align messaging, conversion events, and strategy.

- Produce clear performance reports and insights with actionable next steps on a consistent cadence.



Must-Haves



- Proven experience in media buying with a strong understanding of digital advertising.

- Full-time availability.

- Ability to manage multiple accounts and deliver results quickly.

- Global availability, with preference given to candidates from developed markets initially.

- Openness to flexible, experience-based compensation structures.



Nice To Haves



- Agency background and hands-on performance-focused DTC experience.

- Experience across paid social and paid search channels.

- Familiarity with experimentation frameworks, creative testing, and funnel optimization.

- Understanding of attribution, conversion tracking, and cohort/LTV analysis.

- Strong analytical communication and client-facing presentation skills.



Benefits



- Fully remote engagement with flexible hours and global time zone flexibility.

- Competitive, experience-based pay with room for negotiation.

- Opportunity to work across multiple accounts in a performance-first environment.

- High autonomy to test, learn, and scale winning strategies.

title: Executive Assistant / Operations Manager – DTC Ecommerce
description:
?? COMPLETE YOUR DISC PROFILE AND IQ ASSESSMENT BEFORE APPLYING — APPLICATIONS WITHOUT THESE WILL NOT BE REVIEWED



OVERVIEW



We're a fast-scaling DTC supplement brand with a high-velocity creative pipeline — from concept to live ad in days, not weeks. We need an Operations Manager / Executive Right Hand to own the systems, processes, and coordination that make that speed possible.



This is not a traditional VA role. You'll be the person who builds the machine — hiring and managing freelancers, building SOPs, running the creative production workflow end-to-end, and catching every ball the founders drop. You'll work directly with the CEO.



We're an AI-native team. We use AI across every part of our workflow — scripting, research, production, operations. If you're not already using AI daily to multiply your output, this isn't the right fit.

If you thrive in structured chaos, love building order from scratch, and get satisfaction from airtight execution — keep reading.



WHAT YOU'LL OWN



* Build and maintain the operational systems behind our ad creative pipeline (briefs ? scripts ? UGC ? editing ? launch)

* Hire, vet, and manage UGC creators and freelancers — hold them to deadlines and quality standards

* Create and enforce SOPs across production, asset management, and team workflows

* Run QA on creative output — scripts, hooks, ads — ensuring brand alignment and accuracy before anything goes live

* Manage file organization, platform uploads, and production tracking so nothing falls through the cracks

* Research competitor ads, trends, and creative angles to feed the content pipeline

* Handle operational tasks the CEO shouldn't be spending time on



WHO YOU ARE



* AI power user — this is non-negotiable. You use AI tools daily to write faster, research faster, and build faster. Experience with Claude and Claude Code is a strong preference — if you're already building workflows, automations, or using AI-assisted coding to solve ops problems, you'll stand out immediately.

* Systems thinker — you see a messy workflow and immediately want to document and fix it

* Detail-obsessed — typos, missed deadlines, and sloppy handoffs bother you on a personal level

* Self-directed — you take a problem, figure out the solution, and execute without needing to be managed

* Comfortable with speed and shifting priorities — you don't need things locked in weeks ahead to perform

* Direct communicator — you flag issues early, give honest updates, and don't sugarcoat

Ecommerce, DTC, or ad production experience is a strong plus



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE AT 90 DAYS



* Creative production pipeline is documented, systematized, and running without founder involvement in day-to-day

* UGC creator roster is managed — briefs go out on time, content comes back on spec

* QA process catches issues before they reach the ad account

* CEO has 10+ hours/week freed up from operational tasks

* You've identified and fixed at least 3 workflow bottlenecks nobody asked you to find

title: Account Specialist
description:
The Perfect Sales Job!



We are looking for the top 10% of sales performers in the world. If you have a strong history of sales success, this might be the dream role for you.



What We Offer



Starting with a great base salary, this job offers incredible earning potential:

* Base Salary: $750 USD per month

* Commissions: 5% on all new sales

* Quality Leads: 100% work-from-home with preset and pre-qualified appointments (No cold calling!)



Plus, after your first year, you unlock:

* Health and dental program

* Performance bonuses

*Retirement program



About the Role & Training



Like we said, this is the world's perfect sales job! This role was designed by our CEO, Steven Lloyd, author of four books on selling, internet, and AI technology.



You will not be left to figure things out on your own—you will be personally trained by one of the best salespeople in the world.



Minimum Requirements



Please review these carefully. We are highly selective, and there are no exceptions to these requirements:



* Location: You must be based in the Philippines. Our entire team is built and managed in the Philippines.

* Language Skills: You must be able to speak, write, and communicate in near-perfect American English. A very slight Filipino accent is acceptable. (If you are from Cebu or have extensive BPO phone experience, you might be a perfect candidate!)

* Experience: At least 1 year of experience working US East Coast hours (8:00 AM to 5:00 PM EST / 9:00 PM to 5:00 AM PHT).

* Workspace: A private home working environment completely free of background noise (no barking dogs, crowing roosters, etc.). No exceptions!

Equipment: ?

-- A good working computer (at least 2.5 GHz clock speed, 8 GB of RAM, and an SSD for storage).

-- A high-quality USB headset with a noise-canceling microphone (or the willingness to purchase one).

* Tech Skills: Familiarity with online digital backup. It is easy to learn, and we will train you if necessary, but you must be trainable!

* Tea
etings: Must be able to attend a weekly Zoom tea
eting every Friday at 8:30 AM PHT. Working from home is fun but can be lonely; this ensures you remain independent while feeling like an important part of our international team.



Earning Potential & Expectations



This is honestly the perfect sales job from home. An above-average salesperson can and will generate $50,000 USD (approx. 2.9 million PHP) a year. Take this seriously!



Note: Please do not assume that just because you've worked the phones for a BPO, you are automatically a salesperson. We are truly looking for top-notch sales professionals. If you make the cut, you will be treated like royalty in our company!



HOW TO APPLY (Crucial Step)



To qualify for a personal interview, you MUST put the following exact sentence in the first line of your application:



"I understand and agree with all of the requirements and I honestly believe that I qualify for an interview."



Any application received that does not contain this in the very first line will be immediately discarded and not read. Please do not waste our time, and we will not waste yours!



Then send us a 1-minute video recording of you talking about why we should hire you.

title: Video Editor for Long-Form YouTube Content (Ongoing)

title: Ecommerce / Advertising Virtual Assistant for Fast-Growth Supplement Brand
description:
OVERVIEW

We are a fast-moving supplement brand looking for a highly capable Ecommerce/Advertising Virtual Assistant to support our creative and media production workflows. This role requires strong familiarity with AI tools (Claude and ChatGPT), a sharp eye for quality, and experience in direct-response copywriting and advertising. You will work inside established SOPs, manage creative pipelines, and help elevate the quality of our ad output.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

• Write short-form video ad scripts using detailed SOPs, frameworks, and AI prompt templates.

• Use Atria (spy tool) to identify strong creative angles, study competitor ads, and translate winning concepts into our brand voice and positioning.

• Perform final QC on video ads delivered by editors to ensure they meet our standards in messaging, pacing, and visual quality.

• Help with supporting tasks to our video production pipeline, including uploading to YouTube and organizing creative assets.



REQUIREMENTS

• Expert-level proficiency with AI tools, especially Claude and ChatGPT.

• Demonstrated experience in direct-response copywriting and performance advertising.

• Strong visual taste and the ability to quickly evaluate creative quality.

• Experience in Ecommerce or DTC preferred; supplement/health niche is a plus.

• Highly organized and able to follow and optimize SOPs.

Deliverables

A steady flow of video ad scripts created from our SOPs and AI prompt templates.

Competitive research reports or summaries highlighting strong concepts found via Atria and how they can be adapted to our brand.

Final-QC’d video ads with clear notes, approvals, or flagged issues before they move to publishing.

General VA supporting tasks

title: Accounts Payable Assistant
description:
Position

Accounts Payable Assistant



Job Purpose

The Accounts Payable Assistant is responsible for supporting the efficient and accurate processing of supplier invoices, payments, and expense claims, ensuring compliance with company policies and UK accounting standards.



Key Responsibilities

Invoice Processing

• Process high volumes of supplier invoices accurately and in a timely manner

• Match purchase orders and invoices effectively 

• Resolve invoice discrepancies and queries with suppliers and internal teams

 

Payments

• Support multi-currency payments to suppliers 

• Ensure suppliers are paid in line with agreed terms

• Maintain accurate supplier records and bank details including bank reconciliation

• Assist staff expenses processing and payments 

 

Reconciliations & Controls

• Reconcile supplier statements and investigate variances

• Assist with month-end closing activities related to accounts payable

• Support audit requests and maintain appropriate documentation

 

VAT & Compliance

• Ensure invoices are VAT compliant in line with UK VAT regulations

• Support with VAT reporting and HMRC requirements where applicable

 

Communication & Support

• Respond to supplier and internal finance queries professionally

• Liaise with operational teams to resolve issues

• Support continuous improvement of AP processes



Reporting & accountability

• Respond to supplier and internal finance queries professionally

• Liaise with operational teams to resolve issues

• Support continuous improvement of AP processes









Experience & Key Characteristics

• Previous experience in an Accounts Payable or finance assistant role

• Organised with a good understanding of invoice processing and payment procedures

• Strong attention to detail and accuracy

• Proactive problem solver

• Able to handle confidential information with the upmost discretion

• Confident using Microsoft Excel and accounting systems

• Ability to manage workload and meet deadlines

• Team focused with a positive attitude



Qualifications

• Experience with ERP systems (e.g. Sage, Xero)

• Knowledge of UK VAT rules

• AAT qualification or working towards one (Desirable)



If you are a motivated and ambitious professional looking to take the next step in your career, we invite you to join our team at FoodClean. Apply today to be part of a dynamic and growing organization that values you.



Please submit a video introduction when you apply.

title: Job Title: Static Meta Ads Designer for Backpack Brand
description:
We are seeking a skilled Static Meta Ads Designer for our vacuum compression backpack brand which is active in several countries. We are scaling quickly and are looking for someone to elevate our creative process so we can scale further.

?



Ideally we are looking for long-term employees to join our team. There is a great deal of growth opportunity for those that consistently make a positive contribution to our company. Furthermore, we require someone with attention to detail, so at the top of your application please mention the word "fruit", so that we know you actually read this text. We are seeking candidates that can elevate our creative process and output.



About the role

You’ll create high-converting static ads (image-based) that drive clicks and purchases.



We’re testing various angles and formats: problem/solution, testimonials, visual storytelling, us vs. them.



You will be supplied with brand assets, product images, angle concepts, and copywriting.



You will be on boarded with training on the brand identity, info on the creative styling (Which you can also improve further), and also details on the customer personas.

?



What sets this role apart

We expect you to be skilled with AI image generation tools like Nano banana pro and Seedream etc.,

You’ll use these tools to generate fresh, unique ad creatives in line with the angle and copywriting.

Your creative opinion will always be welcomed and valued if you have ideas on how to improve an ad idea, creative or also the copywriting for example.



What we’re looking for

Experience designing static ads for Meta 
/IG), especially for e-commerce



Eye for direct-response design: not just beautiful, but strategic and conversion-focused



Strong skills in AI image creation to produce unique visuals that match our brand



Ability to deliver multiple iterations for testing, optimized for various placements (feed, story)



Proficiency in the English language, both written and oral?



This position will be paid by the hour, and we will provide you with work for full time hours. We are also open to part time to start if you are the perfect fit.



Please respond by providing your relevant experience, including a visible portfolio of static ads, and also your weekly availability in terms of hours.



I look forward to your proposal and application.



Thank you.



Satish

title: Applicant Experience Director
description:
About Tadhana

Tadhana is the Philippines’ first exclusive matchmaking platform for extraordinary singles. We combine human insight, curated video profiles, and real connection to create meaningful introductions, not just swipes. We’re an early-stage startup building something that doesn’t exist yet in the Philippine market.



The Role

You’ll be the face of Tadhana for every applicant. Your job is to personally interview each person who applies to join the platform, both in-person in the Manila/Makati area and via video call for applicants outside Metro Manila. You’ll assess whether they’re a genuine fit for our community, guide them through the process, and help accepted members build polished, professional profiles, including photos, video introductions, and written bios. Every interaction should reflect the premium, personal brand we’re building.



What You’ll Do

• Conduct in-person interviews with applicants in the Manila/Makati area

• Conduct video call interviews with applicants who can’t meet in person

• Evaluate each applicant’s sincerity, personality, and fit for the Tadhana community

• Score and document each interview using our internal review system

• Communicate decisions to applicants: acceptance, waitlist, or decline, with warmth and professionalism

• Coordinate interview scheduling and follow-ups

• Provide feedback to leadership on applicant trends and common questions

• Help shape the interview process as we grow and refine our standards

• Direct and coordinate professional photo sessions for accepted female members

• Guide members through filming their 60-second video introductions

• Help craft each member’s written profile and bio so it’s polished and on-brand



Who You Are

• Warm, professional, and an excellent judge of character

• Comfortable conducting interviews both in person and on camera

• Strong communicator in English and Filipino

• Discreet and trustworthy, you’ll be handling personal and sensitive information

• Organized and reliable with scheduling and follow-through

• Passionate about relationships, people, and building something meaningful

• Based in or near Manila/Makati with flexibility to meet applicants at designated locations

• Eye for aesthetics, comfortable directing photos, video, and profile presentation



Why This Role Matters

Tadhana isn’t a dating app, it’s a curated community. Every member is hand-selected, and you’re the person making that call. The quality of our platform depends directly on the quality of your judgment and the experience you create for applicants. This is a foundational role with real impact.

title: Account Manger
description:
Status: Part-Time to Start ? Full-Time Opportunity

Hours: 10 AM – 6 PM CST

Company: Egen Media



About Egen Media



Egen Media is a fast-growing real estate marketing company that helps real estate agents generate exclusive seller leads to grow their listing inventory.



Unlike traditional marketing agencies, our model is simple:

Agents purchase qualified seller leads with no upfront fees, no ad spend, and no long-term commitments.



Our mission is to help agents generate consistent listing opportunities while providing world-class support and communication throughout the process.



As we continue scaling, we are hiring a Client Success Manager to support our growing client base, ensure smooth onboarding, and maintain strong relationships with the agents we serve.



This is not a basic support role.



We are looking for someone who can guide clients, solve problems, manage expectations, and protect retention.



Position Overview



The Client Success Manager will act as the primary point of contact for our real estate agent clients.



Your responsibility is to ensure agents understand how the system works, feel supported, and ultimately stay with Egen Media long term.



You will help with:



• Client onboarding

• Answering questions and concerns

• Reviewing lead quality concerns

• Managing expectations around marketing and lead conversion

• Maintaining strong relationships with clients



Your role is critical to reducing churn and increasing client lifetime value.



You will regularly communicate with clients through:



•

• Phone calls

• Google Meets calls

• Messaging platforms (
 / CRM communication tools)



Strong communication and professionalism are absolutely essential.



Key Responsibilities

Client Onboarding



Lead onboarding calls with new clients to ensure they understand:



• How the lead system works

• What qualifies as a seller lead

• What expectations should be for conversion

• Best practices for following up with leads



Your goal is to set the client up for success from day one.



Client Communication & Relationship Management



• Serve as the primary point of contact for assigned clients

• Respond to client questions and concerns promptly

• Maintain consistent communication with clients

• Build trust and strong long-term relationships

• Document important client conversations and updates inside our CRM



Lead Quality Review



Occasionally, clients may question the quality of a lead.



You will:



• Review the lead information

• Verify if it meets our qualification criteria

• Communicate clearly with the client about the outcome

• Issue credits when appropriate based on company policy



Expectation Management



A key part of this role is educating clients on how marketing works.



You will help clients understand:



• Why follow-up matters

• Why not every lead converts immediately

• How agents can improve their closing rates

• Best practices for working seller leads



This helps prevent misunderstandings and improves client success.



Client Retention & Problem Solving



When clients experience frustration or concerns, your job is to:



• Listen carefully

• Acknowledge their concern

• Provide solutions or guidance

• Escalate internally if needed



Your goal is to retain the client whenever possible and keep them satisfied.



Internal Communication



You will also coordinate internally with our team when needed regarding:



• Lead delivery questions

• System updates

• CRM issues

• Client feedback



Clear communication with the internal team is essential.



Qualifications

Required



• Minimum 1–2 years experience in Customer Success, Account Management, or Client Support

• Strong English communication skills (written and spoken)

• Experience working with clients in a professional environment

• Highly organized and detail-oriented

• Comfortable leading calls and speaking with clients

• Ability to stay calm and professional when handling concerns



Preferred



Experience in:



• Real estate industry

• Marketing agencies

• Lead generation companies

• CRM platforms such as GoHighLevel or similar tools



Personality Traits We’re Looking For



• Strong communicator

• Organized and detail-oriented

• Confident speaking with clients

• Problem solver

• Patient and empathetic

• Professional and reliable

• Positive team player



What We Offer



• Stable long-term position

• Competitive monthly pay

• Commission and bonus opportunities

• Opportunity to grow within a fast-growing company

• Work directly with an experienced leadership team

• Exposure to the real estate marketing industry



How to Apply



We are selective in our hiring process because this role is critical to client experience.



To apply, please submit the following:



Loom Video (Required)



Record a 2–4 minute Loom video introducing yourself.



Please cover:



• Your experience in customer success, account management, or client support

• A difficult client situation you handled and how you solved it

• Why you believe you would be a strong fit for Egen Media



Name your Loom video:



FirstName_LastName_Egen_CSM



Resume (Required)



Upload your most recent resume highlighting your relevant experience.



Send Applications To



????

title: Video Editor – DTC, UGC & E-Commerce
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled Video Editor with deep experience in e-commerce (DTC), user-generated content (UGC), AI-assisted editing tools, and VSL-style direct response storytelling.



You will be responsible for concepting, editing, optimizing, and scaling high-performing video assets used across paid social platforms (Meta, TikTok), product pages,
 marketing, and broader brand initiatives.



Responsibilities



- Edit high-converting video ads tailored for DTC brands across TikTok, Meta, YouTube, and additional platforms.

- Build data-driven VSLs (Video Sales Letters) with strong hooks, compelling proof, effective pacing, and clear CTAs.

- Produce and assemble UGC-style ads, including raw voiceovers, testimonials, unboxings, green-screen clips, and reactions.

- Use AI tools (Adobe Firefly, Runway, Descript, Midjourney, etc.) to accelerate editing, ideation, and asset generation.

- Create multiple variations for rapid A/B testing, including hooks, captions, CTAs, and format adjustments.

- Collaborate with marketing teams to ensure alignment with brand voice, messaging, and performance KPIs.

- Add motion graphics, captions, on-screen text, and dynamic transitions optimized for scroll-stopping effectiveness.

- Maintain organized project files, naming conventions, and asset libraries.

- Support content planning, script layout, and storyboard development.



Requirements



- 2–4+ years of video editing experience, preferably in e-commerce or direct response marketing.

- Proven portfolio showcasing DTC ads, UGC content, and both long-form and short-form VSLs.

- Strong proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve.

- Comfortable working with AI editing and asset-generation tools.

- Understanding of performance marketing and the elements that drive video conversions.

- Ability to transform raw footage into compelling storytelling with clean pacing and clear messaging.

- Fast, detail-oriented editor with an experimental, test-driven mindset.

- Excellent communication skills and ability to work in a fast-paced environment.



Bonus Skills



- Experience directing creators or UGC talent.

- Knowledge of e-commerce funnels, landing pages, and CRO principles.

- Thumbnail creation and graphic design familiarity.

- Audio mixing, light color correction, and sound design.

title: Day-Shift Customer Support (Operations support – Remote)
description:
Day-Shift Customer Support Specialist (Remote, Full-Time)



Shift: 09:30 AM – 7:30 PM (Asia Timezone)



Salary & Benefits



Fixed salary: $400–$500 / month



13th Month Pay after 12 months



Long-term stable position



Salary adjustments may be evaluated based on performance and company arrangements



About Us



We are a global payment service provider PAYJN, operating in:



India

Indonesia

LATAM

Southeast Asia



We provide payment infrastructure services for online merchants.

This is NOT a call center job.

This role is a structured operational support position following clear SOP procedures.

Work Schedule



Day Shift (Asia Timezone)



09:30 AM – 7:30 PM

10 hours per shift

6 days per week



Workload is generally light, but you must remain online and responsive during the entire shift.



Idle periods may occur, but availability is still required.



Responsibilities



Reply to merchants through



Use internal BOT tools to check payment status



Follow internal SOP procedures strictly



Communicate clearly in English



Escalate issues to the operations or technical team when necessary



Keep TimeDoctor active during the entire shift



Important (Please Read Carefully)



This role requires:



• Strong discipline

• Full shift availability

• No disappearing during duty hours

• No multitasking other jobs during the shift

• Computer required (mobile-only work is not allowed)



Even during idle periods, you must remain available and responsive.



If you are looking for flexible hours, part-time work, or side income, this role is not suitable.



We are looking for someone interested in long-term stability?



Requirements



Good English comprehension and writing skills

Fast typing and quick response

Ability to follow clear instructions

Stable internet connection (50 Mbps recommended)

Own computer

Quiet working environment

Preferably 25 years old and above

Long-term commitment (1 year or more) preferred



Training Process



We provide structured SOP training.

Training period: 3days



Training includes:



• BOT command usage

• Payment order checking procedures

• Escalation process

• Communication standards



After training, the probation period is 3 months.

Performance will be evaluated based on:



• Response speed

• Accuracy

• Discipline

• Attendance



How to Apply



Please include the following information in your application:



1?? A short self-introduction (please include your age)

2?? Confirmation that you can work the 09:30 AM – 7:30 PM shift (Asia timezone)

3?? A screenshot of your internet speed test

4?? Your customer support or chat support experience

5?? Why you want a long-term position

6?? Your resume (CV) is required



Please note:



After the initial screening, we will conduct a short work assessment.

This test helps us evaluate your thinking process, logic, and communication style.



If the result is suitable, we will contact you as soon as possible for the next step.





To confirm you read this job post, please include the word "PAYJN" at the beginning of your application.

title: Content Operator (B2B & eCommerce Focus)
description:
Job Title: Content Operator (B2B & eCommerce Focus)



Location: Remote Full-Time



Job Overview:

We are seeking a skilled Content Operator to join our team, specializing in business-to-business (B2B) content creation. This role will focus on producing high-quality, knowledge-driven articles and content that enhance our brand image and contribute to building trust with our B2B audience. The ideal candidate should have experience in the eCommerce industry, with a strong understanding of the business landscape and the ability to create content that resonates with a professional audience.



Responsibilities:



B2B Content Creation:



Write in-depth, knowledge-based blogs and articles that focus on industry insights, trends, and best practices relevant to eCommerce and B2B clients.



Produce high-quality content that enhances brand image, establishes authority, and builds relationships with potential business clients.



SEO and Content Strategy:



Optimize content to improve search rankings and visibility, with a focus on improving the website’s domain authority (DA) and Google search rankings using AI-driven SEO strategies.



Research and implement relevant keywords that drive qualified business traffic to the website.



Social Media and Thought Leadership:



Manage and grow the company's LinkedIn, X, YouTube, and other business-focused social media channels.



Create and share thought leadership content that positions the company as a trusted authority in the eCommerce and B2B space.



Cross-functional Collaboration:



Collaborate with the marketing, sales, and product teams to ensure content aligns with company goals and supports business development initiatives.



Assist in creating other company materials such as white papers, case studies, and product documentation.



Qualifications:



Proven experience in writing business-oriented, knowledge-based content, with a focus on B2B clients.



Strong background in eCommerce or digital marketing, preferably with experience in the B2B space.



Expertise in SEO and content optimization strategies to improve organic search visibility.



Excellent written and verbal communication skills with the ability to produce clear, professional content.



Experience managing LinkedIn, X, YouTube, or similar business-focused social media platforms.



Ability to work independently and manage multiple content projects.



Benefits:



Flexible remote work.



Opportunity to contribute to the growth and success of a fast-growing eCommerce company.



Competitive salary based on experience.

title: Business Development

, exhibitions, masterminds, etc.

etings
