title: Influencer & Affiliate Marketer (DTC Ecommerce)
description:
We are looking for an Influencer / Affiliate Marketer with strong experience in driving revenue for DTC and e-commerce brands through creator partnerships and affiliate programs. This role is focused on sourcing, onboarding, and managing influencers and affiliates that generate measurable sales, not vanity metrics.



You will work closely with marketing and content teams to build, optimize, and scale performance driven influencer and affiliate campaigns across social platforms.



Key Responsibilities



- Source, research, and outreach to influencers and affiliates on TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and other relevant platforms

- Run daily outreach via DMs,
, and affiliate platforms

- Onboard creators into affiliate programs and manage relationships end to end

- Negotiate collaboration terms, affiliate commissions, and performance based deals

- Coordinate product seeding, content timelines, and deliverables

- Track and analyze performance including revenue, conversions, CPA, and ROAS

- Identify top performing creators and scale winning partnerships

- Continuously test new creator angles, niches, and platforms

- Maintain organized tracking of outreach, creators, and performance data

- Collaborate with marketing teams on campaign strategy and growth initiatives



Required Experience and Skills



- 1–2+ years of experience in influencer marketing or affiliate marketing for e-commerce or DTC brands

- Proven ability to drive sales through creator partnerships or affiliate programs

- Strong outreach, communication, and negotiation skills

- Experience with TikTok and Instagram influencer ecosystems

- Understanding of affiliate tracking, UTM links, and performance metrics

- Highly organized with strong follow-up and execution skills

- Performance driven mindset focused on revenue and results



Nice to Have



- Experience scaling affiliate programs from scratch

- Familiarity with Shopify, affiliate platforms, or influencer databases

- Experience repurposing influencer content for paid ads

- Basic understanding of paid social or UGC performance creatives

title: Credit Officer & Loan Processor
description:
About the Role



The client is an integrated residential property business, working hand in hand with their clients to provide property buying, advisory and management services, and investment funds. As a Credit Officer & Loan Processor, you will play a key role in supporting the end-to-end loan lifecycle — from credit assessment through to settlement and post-closing activities.



This is a combined role responsible for reviewing and assessing loan applications in line with company credit policy, while also managing the operational processing and documentation requirements of each loan. You will work closely with clients, brokers, sales teams, and internal operations stakeholders to ensure applications are assessed accurately, processed efficiently, and maintained in full compliance with responsible lending regulations. If you are highly detail-oriented, analytical, and thrive in a fast-paced financial services environment, we’d love to meet you.







Key Responsibilities



Credit Assessment



Review all loan applications and assess suitability in accordance with internal credit policy.

Analyse financial information and supporting documentation to determine applicant eligibility.

Complete formal credit assessments and provide recommendations to the GM – Deployment.

Ensure sound credit decision-making aligned with responsible lending standards.



Loan Processing & Operations



Support the end-to-end loan application process from submission to settlement.

Complete accurate data entry and maintain updated loan files.

Order property valuations and gather required supporting documentation.

Prepare loan files for assessment and approval.



Loan Documentation Management



Prepare, manage, and track loan documentation.

Ensure all required documents are accurate, compliant, and complete.

Obtain required signatures and submit applications correctly and within required timelines.



Stakeholder Liaison



Coordinate with clients, brokers, sales teams, and operations tea
mbers to progress applications.

Provide clear and timely updates on loan status.

Proactively identify and resolve issues that may delay approvals or settlements.



Compliance & Legal Requirements



Ensure all activities comply with responsible lending regulations and internal compliance standards.

Maintain accurate and compliant loan records.

Support brokers with internal compliance documentation requirements.



Customer Service



Respond promptly to customer inquiries and provide professional, helpful support.

Build and maintain strong client relationships throughout the loan process.

Deliver a high level of service to both internal and external stakeholders.



Post-Closing Activities



Follow up on loan lodgements and settlement progress.

Process loan discharges and organise settlements in accordance with procedures.

Assist with servicing calculations and operational loan tasks as required.



System & Database Maintenance



Maintain accurate client records within CRM/database systems.

Ensure all documentation is uploaded and tracked appropriately.

HubSpot experience is highly regarded.



Other Responsibilities



You will coordinate with the Property Management Team to ensure that requests and concerns are properly addressed.

Perform other related tasks and duties that may be assigned by the client later on.



About You



Fluent written and spoken English.

At least 3–5 years’ experience in credit assessment, loan processing, or financial services roles.

Strong understanding of responsible lending regulations and credit policy frameworks.

Excellent analytical skills with strong attention to detail.

Ability to manage multiple applications and deadlines simultaneously.

Strong communication and stakeholder management skills.

Experience in residential property lending or mortgage processing is highly regarded.

HubSpot or CRM experience is a plus.

Proactive, organised, and solutions-focused mindset.



Finer Details



Schedule: 7am - 4pm PHT, Mon - Fri



Start Date: TBD

)



Crux Investor is a UK-based investor communications and media company working with publicly listed mining, energy, and critical minerals companies around the world.



We help company executives communicate clearly and credibly with investors through:

Our audience includes fund managers, family offices, and experienced private investors. Professionalism and judgement are core to everything we do.

mber and the founder.



This role focuses on:

This is **not** a high-volume call-centre role. It’s best suited to someone comfortable writing to CEOs and senior decision-makers, with a strong sense of tone and credibility.



You’ll work as part of a small, trusted team where initiative and judgement are valued.

s to executives at listed companies

* Keep CRM notes and next actions up to date

* Communications, marketing, or brand storytelling

* Journalism or content roles

* Client-facing roles requiring professionalism and discretion



You don’t need a formal sales background — but you **must** be comfortable initiating conversations and representing a brand professionally.



## What We’re Looking For



* Excellent written English and a confident, professional tone

* Good judgement when communicating with senior stakeholders

* Ability to personalise messages and avoid hype

* Organised, reliable, and comfortable managing follow-ups

* Collaborative and proactive



Experience with tools like HubSpot, LinkedIn, or
 outreach platforms is helpful but not required.



## What This Is Not



* Not a VA role

* Not a mass
 or cold-calling job

* Not script-only outreach



This role sits closer to **communications and relationship-building** than traditional sales.



## Working with Us



* Remote role with a professional, supportive team

* Clear expectations and structured onboarding

* Opportunity to grow into greater responsibility over time

* Exposure to global markets and senior executives

Please use this form

The Role

Tools You’ll Use

- AI / LLM tools (used responsibly with editorial judgement)



You don’t need experience with all tools - we’ll train you where needed.



Who We’re Looking For:

- Excellent written English (near-native level)

- Strong analytical and organisational skills

- Comfortable managing multiple tasks and deadlines

- Enjoys collaborative remote work

- Interest in investing, markets, or commodities is a strong plus

- Comfortable using AI tools as part of a professional workflow

- Basic video editing experience or willingness to learn



Pay & Growth

- USD $1,100–$1,400 per month, depending on experience

We are building a long-term team, not short-term contractors.

????

The video is informal - phone recording is fine, no editing or production required.

This role involves communicating clearly, so the video helps us understand communication style.

title: Amazon Customer Service Specialist (Full-Time | 2+ Years Consecutive Exp)
description:
Overview

We are looking for a highly reliable, professional, and experienced Amazon Customer Service Specialist to join our growing eCommerce team. We need a "closer"—someone who can handle customer concerns from start to finish with high autonomy and minimal supervision.



Strict Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

Female applicants only.



Experience: Minimum 2 years of straight, consecutive experience in Amazon Customer Service (e.g., 2023–2025 or currently active). We are looking for stability; no job hoppers.



Autonomy: Must be confident in making independent decisions, specifically regarding processing refunds and resolving disputes without constant hand-holding.



Availability: Must be willing to work 40 hours per week on Pacific Time (US Night Shift).



Setup: Stable internet connection and a quiet, professional working environment.



Scope of Work (Customer Service Only)

You will manage Amazon buyer messages and resolve issues professionally. You must have end-to-end experience handling:



Refunds & Returns: Independent decision-making on when to grant refunds.



"Delivered but not Received" cases.



Damaged/Missing Items and Order Cancellations.



A-to-Z Claims & Chargebacks: Managing the process to protect seller metrics.



Negative Feedback/Review Management: Professional outreach and removal requests.



In Your Application, Please Explain:

How you prevent escalations to A-to-Z claims.



Your specific experience with d
 on and processing refunds independently.



Confirmation of your consecutive work dates (e.g., "Company X: Jan 2023 – Present").



How to Apply (The "Test")

To confirm you have read this entire description, you must include the keyword PACIFIC40 in the Subject Line of your message.



Note: Applications without the keyword in the subject line or those that do not meet the 2-year consecutive experience requirement will be automatically declined.

title: Remote Bookkeeper / Accounting Assistant (QuickBooks)
description:
## Job Overview



We are looking for a **reliable and detail-oriented remote bookkeeper** to manage the day-to-day financial records of our growing service businesses. The ideal candidate has strong experience with **QuickBooks Online**, understands **U.S. accounting practices**, and can manage payroll, invoicing, and vendor payments accurately.



This role will help keep our financial operations organized while supporting the leadership team with reporting and cash flow management.



---



# Key Responsibilities



### Bookkeeping



* Maintain and update company financial records in **QuickBooks Online**

* Categorize transactions and reconcile bank and credit card accounts

* Maintain accurate financial statements (P&L, balance sheet, etc.)

* Track job costs and categorize expenses properly



### Accounts Receivable



* Create and send invoices

* Monitor unpaid invoices

* Follow up with customers on overdue balances

* Record payments and maintain accurate records



### Accounts Payable



* Record vendor bills

* Schedule and track payments

* Maintain vendor records and W-9 forms

* Ensure expenses are categorized properly



### Payroll



* Process payroll for employees

* Track timesheets and verify hours

* Maintain payroll records

* Assist with payroll tax reporting if needed



### 1099 Management



* Track contractor payments

* Maintain contractor records and W-9 forms

* Prepare reports for **1099 filings**



### Financial Reporting



* Prepare monthly financial reports

* Track revenue and expenses

* Provide financial summaries to management



### Administrative Accounting Support



* Maintain organized financial records

* Assist with financial audits or tax preparation

* Support business owners with financial questions and reports



---



# Required Qualifications



* Experience with **QuickBooks Online**

* Previous **bookkeeping or accounting experience**

* Understanding of **U.S. accounting standards**

* Experience managing **accounts receivable and accounts payable**

* Strong attention to detail

* Excellent written English communication

* Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

* Reliable internet connection



---



# Preferred Qualifications



* Experience with **service-based businesses**

* Experience processing **U.S. payroll**

* Familiarity with **1099 contractor management**

* Experience using tools such as:



  * QuickBooks

  * Google Sheets

  * Gmail

  * Connecteam (optional)



---



# Compensation



* Competitive monthly salary based on experience

* Long-term remote position

* Opportunity to grow with a rapidly expanding company





# How to Apply



Please include the following:



* Resume

* Description of your **QuickBooks experience**

* Examples of previous bookkeeping work

* Your **monthly salary expectation**

title: Ad Creative Operations Manager
description:
Compensation: 120,
,000 PHP per month depending on experience, plus performance bonuses

Location: Fully remote

Schedule: Monday to Friday, starting at 2:00 PM PH time

Employment Type: Full-time

Pay Frequency: Monthly



We're hiring a Creative Operations Manager to join a rapidly scaling direct response ecommerce brand in the health and beauty space (supplements, skincare, pain relief). The company is on track to reach $5M this year while expanding into new verticals.



You'll serve as the operational engine behind our creative department. The founder operates as CMO and drives creative strategy, but needs a right hand to build processes, track performance, and manage the team day to day. If you thrive in environments where nothing is documented yet and love building structure from the ground up, this is a great fit.



Responsibilities

Develop and roll out SOPs and KPI frameworks for the full creative org (strategists, editors, media buyers)

Oversee daily operations across two creative teams, holding the team accountable for output quality and timelines

Facilitate team syncs (twice weekly) and daily standups focused on key metrics: CPL, spend, delivery volume, and creative hit rates

Spot and resolve bottlenecks in the creative production pipeline before they slow things down

Track creative output and performance, ensuring the team ships 15-30 ad variations daily

Evaluate resourcing needs across teams and proactively flag when additional hires are needed as the company grows

Manage cross-functional workflows between creative strategists, copywriters, editors, and media buyers

Report to the founder/CMO on team health, roadblocks, and process improvements



Requirements

5-7+ years in a comparable operations or project management role within an agency or ecommerce setting

Solid grasp of performance marketing fundamentals: media buying, CPL, ad budgets, creative testing methodology

Track record of designing SOPs and KPI systems for growing teams

Experience managing teams of 5 or more people

Extremely organized with a systems-oriented mindset; you bring order to ambiguity

Excellent written and verbal English

Available to start work at 2PM Philippine time



Preferred Qualifications

Hands-on experience with TikTok Ads and Meta Ads Manager

Familiarity with cash-on-delivery ecommerce models

Background in scaling creative production for direct response campaigns

Comfort using AI tools for content creation and creative workflows

Experience working in ClickUp or similar PM platforms



How To Apply


/4aGJwX4

title: Amazon AI Conversion Creative Lead (Listings, A+, Brand Store)
description:
I am building Apex Horizons, a high-performance ecosystem for Amazon brands. I don't need a "graphic designer" who just makes things pretty. I am looking for a Creative Lead who understands that design is a tool for Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO). You will own the entire visual pipeline using a 100% AI-driven workflow.







Your Mission:



End-to-End Ownership: Take full responsibility for the visual performance of our brands.



AI-Powered Design: Use tools like Nano Banana, Midjourney or Firefly to create hyper-realistic, premium product environments.



AI-Video Production: Utilize Amazon Creative Studio to generate high-impact SBV (Sponsored Brands Video) assets.



Conversion Focus: Analyze CTR/CVR data and image experiments to constantly improve listing performance.



System Building: Help refine a scalable AI-Creative-Pipeline with focus for the German (DACH) market.







Hours & Compensation:



Starting Phase: 5–10 hours per week (Retainer-based / Long-term).



Pay: $10 – $15 per hour. I believe in rewarding high-level expertise and excellence.



Growth: As we scale, your role and rewards will grow.







Requirements:



Amazon Expert: Deep experience with Listings, A+ Content, and Brand Stores (DE/US markets).



AI Master: Obsessed with tools like Gemini, Nano Banana, Midjourney, Firefly, and new AI video tools.



Integrity: My business is built on Christian values. Honesty is my #1 requirement.



Logic-First: You design based on data and psychology, not just "gut feeling."







How to Apply:



Portfolio: Link to your BEST Amazon work (Main Images, A+, Brand Store).



The AI Prompt: What are the 3 most important elements in an image prompt to make a product look like a high-end luxury item?



Availability: How many hours can you dedicate to Apex Horizons per week?



Subject Line: MUST start with the word APEX

title: Client Success Coordinator (Calls + Lead Follow-ups)
description:
Remote | Full-Time



We are looking for a confident communicator who enjoys speaking with people, following up on opportunities, and supporting clients.



This role supports our leadership team by handling inbound inquiries, lead follow-ups, and client coordination.



You are not responsible for closing sales. Senior leadership handles final deal discussions. Your role is to qualify opportunities, manage follow-ups, and maintain strong communication with clients and internal teams.



If you enjoy calls, staying organised, and helping teams perform well, this role could be a great fit.



Responsibilities

Lead Handling

Respond to inbound inquiries from ads and marketing campaigns

Qualify prospects and schedule meetings for leadership

Maintain organised records in the CRM

Lead Follow-Ups

Reconnect with warm leads and past prospects

Send follow-up messages after calls or meetings

Track communication and update pipeline stages

Client Support

Conduct simple client check-ins

Capture feedback and escalate key issues when needed

Help maintain strong client relationships

Virtual Professional Support

Assist with onboarding assigned Virtual Professionals (VPs)

Conduct short check-ins to ensure alignment

Help reinforce service standards and accountability

Admin & CRM

Maintain ClickUp CRM records

Coordinate schedules and meeting confirmations

Ensure communication between leads, clients, and VPs is organised

Requirements

Excellent spoken and written English

Comfortable speaking on calls

Highly organised and reliable

Able to manage follow-ups and multiple conversations

Experience in customer support, sales support, appointment setting, or account coordination is preferred



Nice to Have

Experience with ClickUp or other CRM tools

Experience supporting international clients

Background in B2B services or virtual teams



Why Join Us

You’ll work closely with leadership and play a key role in supporting global clients while helping ensure our Virtual Professionals deliver excellent service.

We value structure, accountability, and long-term growth.



How to Apply

Please complete the application form below:


/
/p/f/8cq1nzj-2656/MVCS5DGC99GM5C48PE/job-application-form

Applications submitted through the form will be reviewed first.

title: eCommerce Business Executive
description:
Own Category Growth, Optimize Performance, and Expand Market Dominance.



Hadley Designs is seeking a Business Executive to take full ownership of a multi-million dollar product category, with Amazon as the primary growth channel. This is a high-impact role for a results-driven e-commerce operator who thrives on ownership, accountability, and driving measurable growth through disciplined execution and data-backed decision-making.



While this role operates deeply within Amazon, we welcome candidates who have driven growth across e-commerce, DTC, or marketplace environments and are excited to apply that experience within a scaled Amazon ecosystem.



How You’ll Win at Hadley Designs:

We believe performance comes from strong systems executed consistently.



Every eCommerce Business Executive is expected to progress through three stages:



- Learn the Playbook – Understand our category strategy, operating standards, and decision frameworks

- Apply the Playbook – Execute accurately and consistently to deliver predictable, scalable results

- Enhance the Playbook – Improve systems with new ideas and strategies after mastery is demonstrated



This order matters. We value innovation, but only when it is grounded in proven execution. Our playbook exists to help high performers win faster, create leverage, and scale impact — not slow them down.



To formally apply, apply HERE:

title: Healthcare Executive Virtual Assistant
description:
Type: Remote

Work Schedule: 8am-5pm PST

Start Date: ASAP



Company Summary:

At Helper Heroes, we’re on a mission to provide exceptional care and support to home care agencies in the U.S. We believe in true partnership where our virtual assistants act as an extension of the care team. Our goal is to ensure a compassionate, innovative, and efficient care experience for clients and families alike. 



Job Summary:

We are seeking an exceptionally organized, structured, and highly proficient Executive Virtual Assistant to provide strategic, high-level support to a multi-business CEO in the homecare sector. This role requires an individual who can operate with maturity, independent judgment, and precision. The ideal candidate will be a structured thinker capable of simplifying complex operational data into concise, logical executive summaries. This is not a simple administrative support role; it requires executive-level communication strength and advanced systems proficiency.



Key Responsibilities:

1. Executive Communication & Judgment

- Manage and organize the executive's inbox with a high degree of discretion and professionalism.

- Draft polished, professional
 responses with advanced grammar and an executive-level tone.

- Provide clear, concise, and structured reporting.

- Confidently and professionally ask clarifying questions when direction or instructions are incomplete.

- Conduct structured research and prepare comparison briefs for executive review.



2. Systems Proficiency & Operational Support

- AxisCare (Agency CRM/Operational Backbone): Learn the system thoroughly, understand workflow and reporting functionality, stay current with updates, maintain data integrity, and extract reports/organize data into simplified executive summaries for strategic decision-making.

- RingCentral (Phone/Text Platform): Monitor call logs and message threads, organize communications, and track follow-ups to support structured communication flow.

- Microsoft Teams: Manage and schedule internal meetings, prepare structured agendas, take/organize meeting minutes, maintain meeting records, and track action items/follow-ups.

Maintain executive dashboards in Excel and manage milestone tracking and relationship reminders.

- Structure and manage the executive's calendar by priority.



Required Qualifications:

- Proven maturity, strong common sense, and professional judgment.

- Exceptional organizational skills and a structured, process-driven mindset.

- Demonstrable advanced proficiency in written and spoken English, including grammar and executive-level tone.

- Strong critical thinking, emotional intelligence, and discretion.

- Experience in learning, managing, and supporting operational integration within CRM systems (AxisCare, WellSky, HubSpot, Salesforce, etc.) and communication platforms (RingCentral, Teams, etc.).

- Ability to operate at an executive level, thinking independently and quickly, without requiring hand-holding.



Why You’ll Love Working with Us: 

- Competitive Base Pay: We offer the highest base pay in the home care industry! 

- Make a Difference: You’ll play a key role in ensuring that clients receive the best care possible. 

- Growth Opportunities: As we grow, so will you! There’s plenty of room for advancement and learning. 

- Fun & Supportive Team: We’re a tight-knit group that values collaboration, compassion, and a good laugh. 





Ready to Be a Hero? 

If you’re excited about the opportunity to join our team, where you’ll be appreciated, have a sense of purpose and inclusion and are willing to help us create a brighter, more compassionate care experience, we can’t wait to hear from you! Apply today and let’s make a difference together. 



IMPORTANT: Directly apply and send your resume on our website: 
/helperheroes/

title: Client Success Manager (Giving Feedback): $1,100 USD START RATE
description:
Start rate: $935 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,100 a month)



Paid every two weeks via Wise.



ABOUT US







Young Publisher is an international digital marketing company working with content creators and online brands.



BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 8 hours daily, Monday-Friday; 40 hours a week

- Flexible schedule: Choose your own hours, as long as you show up for the daily meeting (MANDATORY)

- Stable income: Long-term role with regular, on-time payments

- Supportive team: Collaborative environment without micromanagement

- Growth path: Opportunities to increase responsibilities and earnings

- 100% remote: Work-from-home setup



TASKS



Client Support (maintaining 40-50 total clients):



- Run kickoff calls with new clients using our proven script

- Review client content and give actionable feedback

- Answer client messages within 24 hours

- Host weekly group calls and 1-on-1 coaching sessions

- Help clients overcome content blocks and limiting beliefs



Progress Tracking:



- Update daily/weekly reports

- Track client progress and next steps

- Join daily team check-ins

- Ensure clients follow strategies consistently



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)



- C1+ English (written and spoken) with no accent

- Strong communication skills

- Organized and detail-oriented

- Reliable internet and a quiet workspace

- Accountability mindset and deadline commitment



IMPORTANT



When recording a Loom video as part of your application:



- Camera must show your FACE & SCREEN

- Treat it as a LIVE interview with the Hiring Manager

- Have a professional background

- Have clear audio

- Wear business-casual attire



BONUS SKILLS (NOT REQUIRED)



- Content creation and social media experience

- Knowledge of Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts

- Regular usage of AI tools (ChatGPT, CapCut)



WHY JOIN US?



- Start rate: $935 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,100 a month)

Note: More experienced CSMs earn between $1,800 and $2,500 after 6-12 months.

- Performance bonuses: Up to $900+ additional monthly based on:

- Client retention rates

- Task completion metrics

- Quality of feedback

- Team collaboration

- Payments: Twice per month via Wise directly to your bank

- Tools access: We'll cover all the needed tools

- Work-life balance: No graveyard shifts

- Professional growth: Regular feedback and skill development



HOW TO APPLY



1: Message us on OnlineJobs.ph with "CSM" as the message title



2: Include ONLY the following in your message:



#1: Your CV.

#2: Your years of experience with short-form content.

#3: Your years of experience with client management.

#4: One sentence on why you're a good fit for this role.

#5: Your portfolio.



Note: Messages that do not follow this format will NOT be reviewed.



P.S. Young Publisher is the recruitment company. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Hiring: Vlog Editor (Travel Content)
description:
READ CAREFULLY BEFORE APPLYING



Do NOT send a generic resume or copy-paste response.

If you do not follow instructions exactly, your application will not be reviewed.



This role requires creativity, storytelling ability, and attention to detail — so following directions below is your first test.



You’ve been warned! :)



You can find me on Instagram if you are looking so you know who you’d be working with.



Travel Vlog Video Editor

TYPE OF WORK: Full-Time

SALARY: To be discussed

HOURS PER WEEK: To be discussed

LOCATION: Remote (Philippines)



JOB OVERVIEW

We are seeking a highly skilled Travel Vlog Video Editor who specializes in editing engaging, story-driven travel content.



This role is ideal for someone who understands:



- Travel vlog storytelling

- High-energy, fast-paced editing

- Attention-grabbing hooks and pacing

- Music synchronization and rhythm

- Visual storytelling through cinematic editing



You will be responsible for turning raw travel footage into engaging YouTube-style vlogs that keep viewers watching from start to finish.

This is not just about creating highlight reels — we are looking for someone who can craft a full story-driven vlog experience that blends energy, emotion, and entertainment.



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES



- Edit travel vlog footage into engaging, high-retention YouTube videos

- Create strong hooks that capture viewer attention within the first few seconds

- Maintain fast-paced, dynamic editing while preserving the vlog storytelling style

- Sync music with cuts, transitions, and emotional 
nts

- Use transitions, motion graphics, and effects that enhance travel and lifestyle content

- Apply color grading that enhances the cinematic look of travel footage

- Maintain strong pacing to keep viewers engaged throughout the entire video

- Collaborate with the team using Slack and ClickUp to meet deadlines





ABOUT US

We are Kings of Content — a Christian-based media company that loves Jesus and believes business is ministry.

We help entrepreneurs generate leads and customers through strategic video content.

To date, we’ve produced over 2,400 videos and generated 100M+ views for our clients. 



Our team operates with integrity, excellence, and strong communication.

We pay on time (often early), value loyalty, and create a supportive faith-centered environment.



WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR



- Proven experience editing travel vlogs or lifestyle YouTube content

- Strong understanding of YouTube pacing and viewer retention

- Ability to create high-energy, fast-cut editing styles

- Skilled with music syncing, transitions, and motion graphics

- Experience with color grading for cinematic travel visuals

- Ability to balance dynamic editing with storytelling

- Proficiency in Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or similar editing software

- Organized, reliable, and able to meet deadlines

- Strong communication skills and attention to detail





APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS

To apply, follow these instructions exactly:

1.
 your application to: 

2. Use subject line: “I’m Your Next Travel Vlog Editor”

3. Copy and paste the questions below into your
 and answer thoroughly:



1. How many years of experience do you have editing YouTube or vlog content?



2. Do you have experience editing travel vlogs specifically? Please explain.



3. Share 3 examples of travel vlogs you have edited (YouTube links preferred).



4. What editing software do you use?



5. How do you approach editing a travel vlog to keep viewers engaged?



6. What is your weekly availability and preferred working hours?



7. What is your desired hourly rate?



8. What is your desired per-project rate?



9. Are you comfortable working in a Christian-based company and faith-centered environment?



10. What is one thing you are grateful for?





If you are a creative editor who understands how to turn travel footage into engaging stories people love to watch, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Executive Personal Assistant
description:
Tadhana is the Philippines' first exclusive matchmaking platform for extraordinary singles. We combine human insight, curated video profiles, and real connection to create meaningful introductions, not just swipes. We're an early-stage startup building something new in the Philippine market.

We're looking for an Executive Assistant who will be the right hand to the founder, keeping the business running smoothly both online and on the ground in Manila. This role is split between remote admin work and real, in-person tasks in the city. You'll be the person who gets things done locally while the founder operates remotely.

Day to day, you'll be scouting and securing studio or interview spaces in Manila/Makati, assisting with guerrilla marketing efforts like flyer distribution and local event outreach, helping screen and onboard local hires such as photographers and videographers, researching and negotiating with vendors, coordinating with the development team and hiring director, tracking tasks and deadlines across the business, handling basic bookkeeping and expense tracking, and attending in-person meetings or picking up materials whenever something needs to happen on the ground.

You should be organized, reliable, and proactive. Strong communication skills in both English and Filipino are a must. You need to be comfortable with technology like
, spreadsheets, and project management tools. Trustworthiness and discretion are essential since you'll be handling confidential business information. Most importantly, you need to be based in Manila/Makati and available for regular in-person tasks throughout the week.

title: Customer Specialist VA
description:

title: EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT – Phone Communications & Soft Sales [REMOTE]
description:
**ABOUT THE ROLE**

We’re a close, family-like U.S. long-term rental company looking for a sharp, resourceful, people-savvy Executive Assistant to support day-to-day operations. We’re hiring someone with proven, long-term professional experience — in any field. This is NOT an entry-level position.



We’ll train you on the “what” with leasing — but we need you to bring the “how” with real objection-handling and soft sales intuition. That means:

**Thinking fast under pressure and during live calls

**Guiding conversations naturally and persuasively

**Solving problems before they escalate

**Speaking English clearly and confidently on the phone

**Caring about the business like it’s your own



We value people who treat the business like they’re part of it — not just clocking hours. If you’re the kind of person who goes the extra mile because you take pride in doing great work, you’ll thrive here.



**WHAT YOU’LL ACTUALLY DO**

• Be a reliable, professional point of contact for current tenants

• Manage lease renewals and ongoing tenant communication

• Make phone calls to gather info, follow up, and resolve issues

• Coordinate tasks, track details, and prevent things from falling through the cracks

• Help solve problems independently — and escalate only when needed

• Keep the owner organized and focused



-> This is not a checklist-following job. It’s a *thinking* role for someone who can move fast, stay calm, and figure things out ...many times while still on the phone.



**WHO THIS ROLE IS PERFECT FOR**

• *You speak clearly, confidently, and professionally in English with minimal accent — especially on calls*

• You’re a natural problem solver who can handle unexpected challenges without panic

• You think fast, take initiative, and don’t need hand-holding

• You genuinely care about the quality of your work and the business you’re supporting

• You’re someone who prepares, researches, and shows up ready

• You value long-term stability and being part of a trusted team



-> No property management or sales experience required

-> *Training provided — but success in this role depends on your ability to communicate smoothly and handle objections in live conversations with clarity and confidence*



**WORK SCHEDULE**

This is Remote (Work from Home – must have reliable computer & internet)

• Full-time (40 hours/week) | Independent Contractor

• You choose your exact working hours, but must be reachable and responsive during U.S. Pacific Time business hours (7 AM – 7 PM, Mon–Fri), with active work occurring within that window



**COMPENSATION & GROWTH**

*Base pay up to $800/month to start,* with performance-based increases and bonuses for reliability, initiative, and strong work ethic.

Long-term role with real stability — no short-term rentals, no Airbnb chaos

Direct collaboration with the business owner — your work will actually make a difference



**FROM A CURRENT TEA
MBER**

“Working with Heavenly Happy Homes over the past year has been an experience I am truly blessed and grateful for. It has indeed been life-changing. From the very beginning, I felt trusted, supported, and encouraged to do my best. That kind of environment makes a huge difference, especially when working remotely. After going through uncertainty in a previous role, I was really praying to find a company where I could grow, learn, and feel secure long-term. Heavenly Happy Homes turned out to be exactly that and more. You genuinely find yourself loving the company and sincerely caring about the work you do. The culture here is respectful and collaborative, and everyone truly wants to see each other succeed. Even as a remote team, there is a strong sense of teamwork and shared purpose, which I honestly love. Training is efficient and well guided. R.S. helped me a lot, especially in understanding processes clearly. Another thing I can sincerely say is that hard work here never goes unnoticed. It is always valued and genuinely appreciated. Our boss is truly a wonderful employer!”



**HOW TO APPLY**

Submit your application here: 

Applications through OLJ may not be considered. Please complete the application at the link in this post.

Qualifications

etings daily

title: Cold Caller (Fluent English) – Remote, Full-Time/Part-Time
description:
Company: Scaling Edge (AI-powered demand gen agency)?Location: Remote (Philippines) | Hours: UK business hours (Mon–Fri, 9am–6pm London)?Compensation: $5–$7/hour base (DOE) + commission per closed sale



Role Summary

You will run outbound calling to book qualified appointments for our sales team (B2B services). You’ll follow proven scripts, handle objections, qualify prospects, and schedule meetings directly to calendar/CRM. We are ONLY hiring candidates with near-native English and proven cold calling success.



Key Responsibilities

* Make 80–120 dials/day (predictive or power dialer) to targeted B2B lists.

* Open strong, follow a script, ask qualifying questions, and book/calendar appointments.

* Handle common objections, recover the call, and progress to the next step.

* Log every call with clear notes, call outcomes, and follow-ups in our CRM (GoHighLevel/HubSpot).

* Hit weekly targets: dials, talk time, booked calls, show rate, and qualified opportunities.

* Run rapid A/B tests on openings and rebuttals; report learnings daily.

* Maintain list hygiene; flag bad data and suggest list improvements.

* Attend brief daily huddles; submit end-of-day reports.



Outcomes / KPIs

* Dials: 80–120/day

* Talk Time: 90–150 mins/day

* Booking Rate: 2–5% of answered calls (varies by list)

* Show Rate: 65%+ (with reminders)

* Qualified Meetings: Meets ICP and basic budget/need/timeline criteria

* CRM Hygiene: 100% of calls logged with next action



Must-Have Qualifications

* English: Near-native fluency (C1/C2). Neutral, easy-to-understand accent. Excellent grammar and idiomatic usage.

* Experience: 1–3+ years in cold calling/tele-sales/appointment setting (B2B preferred).

* Proof of performance: Past KPIs (dials/day, bookings/week, show/close rates) and call recordings.

* Objection handling: Confident, concise, and coachable.

* Tech: Reliable laptop, wired internet (?25 Mbps down / 10 Mbps up), quiet workspace, noise-cancelling headset.

* Tools: Comfortable with dialers (Aircall, RingCentral, GO HighLevel), Google Workspace, Slack.

* Availability: Can work UK daytime hours consistently; minimal schedule conflicts.



Strong Pluses

* Lived/studied in an English-speaking country or attended English-medium schools.

* B2B agency, SaaS, consulting, or high-ticket service experience.

* Calendar booking + CRM automation (GoHighLevel) familiarity.

* Copy/DM outreach skills to complement calling.



Compensation & Growth

* Base: $5–$7/hour depending on experience and voice quality.

* Commission: Per closed sale (uncapped).

* Performance bonuses: Monthly bonuses for exceeding KPIs.

* Advancement: Senior Caller, Team Lead, QA/Trainer for top performers.



Training & Support

* 3 days paid onboarding: product, ICP, scripts, objections, CRM.

* Live call coaching, recorded call reviews, and weekly optimization.



How to Apply (follow exactly)
: 

 subject: Cold Caller – [Full Name] – [City]?Include ALL items below, or your application won’t be reviewed:

1. 1–2 minute Loom recording (Introduce yourself + read the script in the next section).

2. 2 call recordings from prior roles (cold calls).

3. Speed test screenshot (speedtest.net) showing current wired connection.

4. Short cover note (5–7 sentences): why you’re a fit, your hourly rate expectation, earliest start date.

5. Working hours confirmation that you can do Mon–Fri, 9am–6pm London time.



Voice Sample Script (this is not a word for word script, we want you to freestyle. Do not use chatgpt, we want to see how you naturally use the English language)

Name -

Previous experience -

30 second pitch for why we should hire you -

30 second pitch for why anyone should visit the Philippines





Disqualifiers (do NOT apply if any apply)

* Heavily accented speech that’s hard to understand.

* Grammar errors in the application or cover note.

* No call recordings or voice sample.

* Inability to work UK hours consistently.

* Noisy background or unstable internet.

title: FULL TIME JOB: History Documentary Video Editor for YouTube (Long-Form)
description:
FULL TIME JOB: History Documentary Video Editor for YouTube (Long-Form)



ONLY APPLY IF YOU HAVE REAL EXPERIENCE EDITING HISTORY DOCUMENTARIES

If you have not edited long-form history documentaries before, please do not apply.



We are hiring a full-time History Documentary Video Editor who can consistently produce 30–50 minute YouTube documentaries with strong pacing, clean structure, and a premium documentary feel. This is a long-term role and we need someone reliable who can deliver daily output once the style is locked.



What you’ll be producing

 • Daily 30–50 minute history documentary videos for YouTube

 • Documentary-style edits: clear narrative flow, engaging pacing, professional tone

 • Supporting visuals: archival footage, historical photos, maps, timelines, on-screen dates and labels, simple b-roll

 • Clean audio mix with tasteful background music when appropriate



What you’ll do

 1. Long-form documentary editing

 • Create script and Voice over with AI (Takes 30 minutes in total) and then start your video edit

 • Maintain attention for 30–50 minutes through pacing, visual variety, and structure

 • Use clean transitions and consistent editing style

At the end of the day you'll upload your finished video



 2. Visual sourcing and on-screen storytelling

 • Source and place relevant visuals: archival footage, images, maps, and documentary-style b-roll

 • Add simple on-screen elements: dates, names, lower thirds, captions, quotes, and map/timeline 
nts

 • Keep visuals clear and informative, not flashy



 3. Quality control and delivery

 • Ensure professional exports, clean audio levels, correct formatting, and consistent style

 • Use copyright-safe assets and avoid content claims as much as possible

 • Deliver on time, every day, with reliable communication





QUALITY BAR

We are looking for editors who can produce a premium history documentary feel:

 • Strong pacing and structure for long videos

 • Visual variety (no repetitive visuals for long stretches)

 • Clear and professional audio

 • Consistent documentary style across uploads

 • Clean, credible, educational tone



Tools

Use any professional editing tools you prefer (Premiere, DaVinci Resolve, Final Cut, After Effects, CapCut, etc.). Output quality and speed matter most.



How to apply (important)

START your application with the word “HISTORY” to show you're real.



Then include:

 1. 3–5 examples of history documentary edits you personally made (30+ minutes preferred)

 2. A short description of your exact role in those projects (editing, sourcing visuals, sound, etc.)

 3. Your workflow and software

 4. Your availability and how many long videos you can realistically deliver per week



If you do not provide real history documentary examples, your application will be ignored.



Test

Shortlisted candidates will receive a small test:

 • Edit a 1-2 minute short test

 • If the quality matches, we proceed long-term



Compensation

$500 per month flat (plus performance bonuses).

Performance bonuses

100k views on a video = $50 bonus

250k views = another $50 bonus

800k views = $200 bonus on top of what you already had



If your quality and reliability exceed expectations in the first 2–4 months, pay will increase.



We’re looking for someone long-term and full-time. Please do not apply if you have too many active clients or cannot commit daily.

title: Part Time Backend Developer (Node.js / Firebase) – REMOTE
description:
We are expanding our engineering team and are looking for a skilled Backend Developer to support and enhance our existing production systems. This role focuses on maintaining and improving applications built on a Node.js and Firebase (Google Cloud Platform) environment.



You will work on live systems, contribute to new feature development, and help ensure our backend services remain reliable, secure, and scalable.



What You’ll Do:

- Take responsibility for maintaining and improving backend services running in production

- Build and enhance backend functionality using Node.js and Firebase

- Develop and manage APIs, cloud functions, and serverless services

- Monitor and improve system performance, security, and reliability

- Handle deployments and maintain CI/CD and version control workflows

- Participate in knowledge transfer and transition activities with the current developer

- Deliver ongoing updates, feature improvements, and technical support



Core Requirements:

- 5+ years of backend development experience

- 3+ years working with Node.js and Firebase

- Experience deploying and operating backend services on Google Cloud Platform (GCP)

- Proven experience designing and maintaining RESTful APIs and serverless architectures

- Experience managing production systems, including performance tuning and security practices (Firebase Auth, IAM roles, HTTPS, JWT)

- Familiarity with Git-based workflows (GitHub, GitLab, or Bitbucket)

- Experience maintaining CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, or Cloud Build)

- Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities

- Clear English communication skills, particularly when explaining technical decisions



Additional Experience That’s Helpful:

- Working with Firebase Cloud Functions or GCP Cloud Functions in serverless environments

- Familiarity with other Google Cloud services such as Cloud Run, Pub/Sub, or Cloud Storage

- Background in finance or fintech systems, especially involving security or transaction processing

- Experience with backend monitoring and logging tools like Firebase Analytics or GCP Monitoring

- Knowledge of authentication and authorization methods such as OAuth or JWT

- Exposure to Terraform or similar infrastructure-as-code tools

- Experience managing staging and production environments and release processes

- Familiarity with API documentation tools like Swagger or OpenAPI

- Experience guiding backend direction during project transitions or mentoring developers



Work Schedule:

- Part-Time (around 20 hours per week)

- Flexible within 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Philippine Time

title: Shopify Inventory Management Expert
description:
About the Role:



We are looking for a skilled Shopify Inventory Management Expert to help us streamline and optimize our inventory operations for our online brand. This is a part-time, contract role working fully remotely. The ideal candidate lives and breathes Shopify — someone who has hands-on experience managing inventory at scale, knows the best apps and tools in the ecosystem, and can hit the ground running with minimal direction.



What You'll Be Doing



Manage and maintain accurate inventory levels across our Shopify store

Set up, configure, and optimize inventory management apps and integrations (e.g., EasyScan, Stocky, Skubana, ShipHero, Linnworks, etc.)



Build and maintain workflows for receiving, fulfillment, and stock transfers

Monitor inventory health — identifying low stock, overstock, and discrepancies

Create and maintain SOPs for inventory processes so the team can operate consistently

Troubleshoot inventory sync issues between Shopify and any connected platforms (3PL, marketplaces, etc.)

Generate inventory reports and provide recommendations to improve efficiency and reduce shrinkage

Support barcode scanning and SKU management workflows as needed





What We're Looking For



3+ years of hands-on Shopify experience, with a strong focus on inventory management

Deep familiarity with Shopify's native inventory system and its limitations

Experience with third-party inventory apps — you know what works, what doesn't, and why

Comfortable working with purchase orders, stock adjustments, and multi-location inventory

Strong attention to detail — inventory errors cost money, and you know that

Ability to document processes clearly for non-technical tea
mbers

Self-starter who can work independently in a remote environment

Bonus: experience with 3PL integrations, Shopify Plus, or multichannel selling (Amazon, TikTok Shop, etc.)





Tools & Platforms You May Work With

Shopify / Shopify Plus · EasyScan · Stocky · Skubana / Extensiv · ShipHero · Linnworks · ShipStation · Google Sheets · Slack



Engagement Details



Type: Part-time contractor (1099 / independent contractor)

Hours: Estimated 10–20 hours/week (flexible based on workload)

Location: Fully remote

Rate: Competitive — please include your hourly rate when applying





How to Apply

Please send the following to [your hiring
]:



A brief intro about your Shopify inventory experience

Examples of stores or brands you've supported

The apps/tools you're most proficient with

title: Healthcare Recruiter
description:
Job description:



We are a growing U.S.-based healthcare company seeking a Recruiter / Interview Specialist to support therapist hiring across multiple departments.



This role is call-heavy and interview-focused, with additional responsibility for coordinating hiring needs and tracking recruitment progress. Approximately 90% of your work will involve phone interviews with therapist candidates.



If you are not comfortable being on calls for most of your shift, this role is not a good fit.



Role Overview



• You will conduct daily phone interviews with licensed therapists (PT, OT, ST, PTA, COTA), coordinate with internal teams on hiring needs, and manage the recruitment pipeline from job posting through candidate handoff.

• You are the first point of contact for candidates and a key link between departments, so professionalism, organization, and communication are essential.



Key Responsibilities



• Interviewing & Screening (Primary Focus)

• Conduct high-volume phone interviews daily with therapist candidates.

• Screen candidates for: Licensure and credentials, Experience and specialties, Availability and geographic coverage,



Communication skills and professionalism

• Clearly explain roles, expectations, and next steps.

• Identify red flags and escalate concerns when necessary.

• Recruitment Coordination & Follow-Ups

• Follow up with candidates after interviews as needed.

• Coordinate with internal departments (staffing, operations, leadership) to understand current and upcoming hiring needs.

• Schedule next steps and hand off qualified candidates appropriately.

• Maintain timely and professional communication with candidates throughout the process.

• Job Posting & Process Tracking

• Post job openings on approved platforms as hiring needs change.

• Track candidates through each stage of the recruitment process.

• Keep recruitment trackers or ATS accurate and up to date.

• Provide basic updates on hiring progress when requested.



What We’re Looking For



• Comfortable being on the phone most of the workday.

• Clear, confident, professional speaking voice.

• Strong listening and judgment skills.

• Highly organized and detail-oriented.

• Able to manage follow-ups and coordination without losing 
ntum.



Qualifications



• 1–2+ years of experience in: Recruiting, Healthcare staffing, HR screening, Call center interviewing

• Excellent spoken and written English.

• Comfortable conducting multiple interviews per day.

• Familiar with Google Workspace (Sheets, Docs).

• Bonus: Experience recruiting healthcare professionals or independent contractors.



Requirements



• Reliable internet connection.

• Quiet, professional work environment for calls.

• Ability to work U.S. (PST) business hours.

• Part-time or full-time availability (to be discussed).



How to apply



• Please send a brief cover letter outlining your experience that is aligned or related to the role you are applying for. Make sure to include the specific tasks you have handled, as well as the link to your resume.

• Kindly monitor your OLJ inbox, as I will send the final interview link and your schedule there if you are shortlisted for the position.



Job Type: Part-time



Benefits:



• Paid training

• Work from home



Experience:



• Recruiting: 2 years (Required)

• Healthcare Staffing: 1 year (Required)

• Work Location: Remote

title: Program Coordinator
description:
Job description:



Senior Operations Coordinator (Virtual Assistant)



Quest Collective | Full-Time | Remote



About Quest Collective



Quest Collective is a fast-growing, mentoring-first NDIS provider supporting teens and young adults to become the hero of their own story. We specialise in high-quality mentoring, Supported Independent Living (SIL), and capacity-building supports for young people aged 13 to 40.



As we scale, we are building a highly structured, audit-ready operations engine. We are seeking a Senior Operations Coordinator (VA) who can take ownership of core operational workflows and keep our systems running with precision, compliance, and care.



This is not an entry-level admin role. We are looking for a senior operator who can think critically, act proactively, and maintain high standards without constant supervision.



Role Purpose



The Senior Operations Coordinator is responsible for the smooth, compliant, and accurate execution of daily operations across rostering, ShiftCare administration, invoicing support, payroll preparation, and compliance monitoring, rostering and scheduling.



You will act as a key operational backbone of the organisation, ensuring participant supports run smoothly and the business remains audit-ready at all times.



Key Responsibilities



ShiftCare Systems Management



Maintain accurate participant and staff profiles

Monitor case note completion and quality

Ensure service agreements and funding data are current

Support incident and feedback recording workflows

Maintain clean, audit-ready digital records

Identify and resolve data discrepancies proactively

Rostering and Scheduling (High Priority)



Build and maintain weekly rosters across 1:1, 1:2, 1:3 and SIL supports

Fill vacant shifts quickly and appropriately

Monitor staff availability, fatigue risk, and suitability

Communicate roster changes clearly and professionally

Escalate coverage risks early

Support SIL ratio integrity

Invoicing and Finance Support



Review and approve timesheets in ShiftCare

Prepare accurate invoices for NDIA and plan managers

Export data to Xero

Check kilometres and line item accuracy

Flag billing anomalies early

Support end-of-week finance workflows

Payroll Preparation (SCHADS Award Awareness)



Prepare clean payroll data for processing

Verify hours, sleepovers, and allowances

Flag discrepancies before payroll runs

Maintain employee and contractor records

Support SCHADS Award alignment

Compliance and Audit Readiness



Monitor worker compliance (screening, First Aid, licences, insurance)

Track document expiries and send reminders

Maintain audit evidence folders

Support NDIS Practice Standards alignment

Assist with internal quality checks

Maintain incident and feedback registers

Communication and Team Support



Liaise professionally with mentors, coordinators, and leadership

Follow up incomplete documentation

Support onboarding workflows

Maintain warm, clear, and firm communication

Escalate risks and issues early

Required Experience (Non-Negotiable)



Minimum 2+ years experience working with the NDIS

Strong hands-on experience with ShiftCare

Proven rostering experience in disability, SIL, or community care

Solid understanding of NDIS line items and service delivery

Experience supporting invoicing and payroll workflows

Excellent written and verbal English

High attention to detail and accuracy

Strong time management and reliability

Ability to work autonomously in a remote environment

Highly Desirable



Experience with Xero

SIL operational experience

SCHADS Award familiarity

Experience in a fast-scaling NDIS provider

Previous senior VA or operations role

Process improvement mindset

Personal Attributes We Value



We are looking for someone who:



Takes ownership and follows through

Thinks ahead and prevents problems

Communicates calmly under pressure

Is highly organised and systems-driven

Notices small errors before they become big problems

Balances compliance with practical operations

Is proactive, not reactive

Genuinely cares about participant outcomes

AND, who loves to have a laugh & has a great attitude!



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)



Success in this role will be measured by:



Rosters filled and stable

Minimal shift gaps

Timesheets processed accurately and on time

Invoices submitted without errors

Compliance dashboard maintained at 100% currency

Minimal payroll corrections required

Fast and professional team communication

Audit readiness maintained at all times

Completes assigned tasks effectively and efficiently and communicates issues promptly

Excellent at creating SOP’s and rolling them out across the organisation

Working Requirements



Full-time remote role

Must be available during Queensland business hours

Reliable high-speed internet and quiet workspace required

Reports directly to Operations Manager / Director

Must demonstrate strong data security and confidentiality practices

Why Join Quest Collective



Mission-driven, high-growth organisation

High ownership senior role

Structured systems and clear expectations

Opportunity to grow with the business

Meaningful work supporting young people and families

Application Instructions



Please submit:



1. Your resume



2. A short video or written introduction



3. Your specific experience with ShiftCare, SCHADS, Fairwork, OHS, WHS and the NDIS



4. Your availability and timezone



5. What makes you stand out from everyone else applying- a great sense of humour and attitude are a must!



Benefits:



Professional development assistance

Work from home

Work Location: Remote

title: Apparel Graphic Artist (Strong T-Shirt Design experience)
description:
PLEASE READ: WE NEED CANDIDATES WITH STRONG PORFOLIO WITH ORIGINAL DESIGNS FOR T-SHIRT PRINTING AND RELATED PROJECTS. Please attach/share portfolio link.



Position Type: Full-time

Location: Philippines (Remote)

Schedule: 7am-3pm EST (Florida)

 

About the Company



Our client is a fast-growing US company specializing in large-scale custom apparel for corporate and commercial clients. They partner with well-known organizations to create high-quality, thoughtfully designed apparel that reflects each client’s brand, values, and identity. With a strong focus on print excellence and scalable production, the company blends creativity with commercial practicality to deliver designs that perform in real-world manufacturing environments.



They value craftsmanship, clarity of design, and continuous improvement - and they actively encourage the use of modern tools, including AI, to produce better work more efficiently.



About the Role



This is a hands-on, creative role. The Apparel Designer will be a huge contributor in developing concepts and finished designs that align with the company’s established aesthetic and are suitable for large-scale production.



You will take creative direction, reference samples, and written briefs and turn them into print-ready apparel designs that are both visually compelling and commercially viable.



Responsibilities



- Create original apparel artwork for t-shirts and related products, aligned with the company’s design style and references

- Develop design concepts from briefs and evolve them into finished, production-ready artwork

- Design with print and fabric in mind, ensuring artwork translates well to physical garments

- Apply strong typography, illustration, and composition principles to apparel graphics

- Prepare clean, organized, print-ready files for production teams

- Incorporate feedback and revisions while maintaining creative integrity

- Balance creativity with scalability, cost-awareness, and production constraints

- Collaborate with internal teams to ensure designs meet brand, quality, and production standards

- Leverage AI and other tools to ideate, iterate, or improve workflow efficiency when appropriate

 

Competencies and Qualifications



Must-Have



- Proven experience designing original artwork for apparel or merchandise

- Strong portfolio demonstrating original t-shirt or apparel designs (not just mockups or layouts)

- Proficiency in Adobe Illustrator (required); Photoshop experience preferred

- Solid understanding of apparel printing processes (screen printing, DTG, DTF, or similar)

- Knowledge of color theory, typography, and illustration for print

- Ability to prepare print-ready files with proper color, layering, and formatting

- Proficiency with PC platforms and Adobe Creative Suite, primarily Photoshop

- Proficiency with AI tools such as generative image tools, ChatGPT, Adobe Firefly

- Comfortable completing a paid design test as part of the evaluation process



Key Qualities



Action-Oriented – Takes initiative, moves designs forward efficiently, and delivers work without constant oversight

Detail-Oriented – Pays close attention to typography, spacing, color, and production accuracy

Collaborative – Works well with creative, production, and operations teams; open to feedback and iteration



What We Offer



- 100% Remote Work – Work from anywhere in the Philippines.

Ylopo is seeking a sharp, solutions-driven IT Business Analyst to help transform business needs into clear, actionable requirements. If you're passionate about documentation, testing, and process optimization, and thrive in collaborative, fast-paced environments, this is your chance to make an impact. Evaluate business processes, identify areas for improvement and develop and implement effective solutions based on process evaluations.

Assist/Lead ongoing reviews of business processes and develop optimization strategies, identify opportunities for process improvements and automation.

Develop and maintain process models, specifications, diagrams, and charts to guide the project team. Effectively communicate complex information through simple, easily understandable visuals.

Conduct end-user training, process walkthroughs and reporting overviews.

Handle spot requests and assist with any other ad hoc duties assigned.

 



Qualifications/Skills:



Must have 2+ years of experience as IT Business Analyst

Excellent documentation skills, coupled with strong communication, presentation, and written abilities. Must also possess a strong team work spirit.

Excellent planning, organizational, and time management skills.  

Strong analytical, conceptual thinking, and problem-solving skills are essential. Must be meticulous and capable of clearly understanding, de-complicating, and proposing improvements to business requirements for project stakeholders.

Highly self-motivated, directed, can work independently with minimum assistance.

Ability to effectively prioritize and execute tasks while under pressure.

Knowledge of Software Development Life Cycle and experience in Agile project delivery will be an advantage.

Proficiency in SQL scripting is a must.

Strong understanding and experience with Extract, Transform, and Load (ETL) processes and Business Intelligence/Business Analytics (BI/BA) platforms is a plus.

16GB with 100GB Free disk space

A Headset with noise cancelling feature is a must

20 mbps minimum wired connection for main isp

Back up internet is a must (pocket wifi, prepaid wifi etc. but strictly no USB Sticks allowed)

Back up power source

 



Shift Schedule: 8AM - 4PM Pacific Standard



Rate: depends on experience

title: Job Title: Civil/Structural Engineer – Training in Tekla Structures, STAAD.Pro, and Civil 3D
description:
I am seeking a qualified Civil or Structural Engineer to provide one-on-one remote training and practical mentorship in Tekla Structures, STAAD.Pro, and Autodesk Civil 3D. The objective is to develop strong practical skills in structural modelling, structural analysis, and civil engineering design workflows.



Scope of Training:



STAAD.Pro



- Structural modelling and project setup

- Load application (dead, live, wind, etc.)

- Running structural analysis

- Interpreting analysis results

- Basic structural design checks using relevant codes



Tekla Structures



- Structural modelling workflow

- Modelling beams, columns, connections, and foundations

- Model organisation and detailing

- Generation of general arrangement drawings and fabrication drawings

- Best practices for structural modelling and detailing



Civil 3D



- Surface creation and terrain modelling

- Road alignment and profile design

- Corridor modelling basics

- Site grading and earthwork calculations

- Preparation of civil engineering drawings and layouts



Training Format



- Remote sessions using screen sharing

- Practical exercises with step-by-step guidance

- Review of assignments and feedback

- Approximately 2–4 hours per week depending on availability



Requirements



- Degree in Civil or Structural Engineering

- Strong experience with Tekla Structures, STAAD.Pro, and Autodesk Civil 3D

- Experience in structural design or civil engineering projects

- Ability to explain concepts clearly and provide practical demonstrations

- Good English communication skills



Engagement Type:

Freelance / hourly contract



Location:

Remote (candidates from the Philippines or other regions with strong CAD/engineering expertise are welcome)



Objective:

The goal of this engagement is to develop practical engineering software skills so the trainee can independently perform structural analysis, structural modelling, and civil engineering design work using Tekla Structures, STAAD.Pro, and Civil 3D.



Interested candidates should provide:



- Brief description of experience

- Examples of relevant projects or models

- Hourly rate

title: Part Time Position For SEO Expert
description:
An exciting opportunity exists for a high-level SEO Expert in the online marketing and website design industry to join a results-driven agency focused on conversion and measurable growth.



We are not looking for a "technical robot." We are looking for a strategic thinker who understands that SEO is about driving revenue, not just vanity metrics. You will be working directly with our internal team and clients to improve visibility, authority, and lead generation. This is a role for someone who takes ownership and treats every client’s business as if it were their own.



TECHNICAL INFRASTRUCTURE REQUIREMENTS: • Extremely stable high-speed internet connection with backup options. • Modern PC/Laptop capable of handling heavy SEO tools and multi-tab workflows. • Ability to work within the Perth/Philippines timezone (GMT+8).



CORE TECH STACK: • SEO Tools: Ahrefs, SEMRush, Screaming Frog. • Analytics: Google Search Console, Google Analytics 4 (GA4), Google Tag Manager. • Reporting: Looker Studio (Google Data Studio). • CMS: WordPress (Elementor/Gutenberg experience preferred). • Project Management: ClickUp or similar high-level task management.



THE MANDATE: High attention to detail and strict adherence to instructions are non-negotiable. We operate on a "zero-mistake" policy for basic execution. If you cannot follow a process, do not apply.



=============================================================================== REMUNERATION & LOGISTICS • Rate: $15 AUD Per Hour • Permanent Basis (Long term) • 20 Hours per week (Part-Time) • Rapidly growing company with career progression opportunities • Timezone: Perth, Western Australia (GMT+8) MUSTS: • Exceptional spoken English (Clarity is vital) • Exceptional written English (For outreach and technical audits)THE SKILL MATRIX: SEO EXPERTISE • Advanced Keyword Research: Identifying high-intent "buyer" keywords over high-volume "junk." • Technical SEO: Schema markup, Core Web Vitals, site architecture, and indexation fixes. • On-Page Optimization: Mastering H-tags, meta-data, internal linking, and LSI implementation. • Link Building Strategy: Genuine outreach and authority building, not spammy backlink packages. • Content Strategy: Auditing existing content and briefing writers for SEO-first 
ILOSOPHY: CONVERSION VS. RANKINGS We do not care about ranking #1 for a keyword that doesn't sell. We are "Advisors," not "People Pleasers." If a client asks for a strategy that you know will fail or waste their budget, you are expected to speak up, provide the data-backed alternative, and guide them toward the better outcome. You must be a conversion-focused SEO, not a checklist-filler.



=============================================================================== CRITICAL THINKING EXAMPLE Scenario: A client’s organic traffic has dropped by 40% in 30 days, but their primary "money pages" haven't lost their rankings. Task: What are the first three things you check, and what questions do you ask the development team? (Include this in your cover letter).CULTURAL EXPECTATIONS: • Zoom/Camera On: We are a high-trust, high-transparency team. All meetings are cameras on. • Process Driven: If a process doesn't exist, you help build it. If it does exist, you follow it. • Proactive Communication: We hate chasing people. You provide updates before we ask for them.



DAILY WORKFLOW: • Morning check-ins via Slack/Teamwork. • Execution of technical audits and monthly optimizations. • Reviewing Search Console spikes or dips and reacting immediately. • Client liaison and performance reporting.



THE FINAL FILTER: To be considered for this role, you MUST include a link to aVoice Recording(Vocaroo or Loom) introducing yourself and explaining your most successful SEO campaign to date.



FAILURE TO PROVIDE A VOICE RECORDING OR ADDRESS THE CRITICAL THINKING SCENARIO WILL RESULT IN IMMEDIATE DISQUALIFICATION. WE VALUE DETAIL ABOVE ALL ELSE.

title: Project: Server-Side Tracking Setup — WordPress Site
description:
Overview

I need a freelancer to set up server-side tracking on my WordPress site (Hostinger, Cloudflare). The goal is to have all pixels firing accurately so my ad campaigns can optimize effectively — and so my audience data is already building before I scale advertising next year.

Platforms to Track



Google Tag / GA4

Bing (Microsoft) Ads

Meta Pixel

X 
) Pixel

TikTok Pixel



Requirements



Server-side implementation so data collection is not affected by ad blockers or browser-based tracking restrictions

Conversion events must fire correctly — page views, key engagement actions, and any form submissions or sign-ups

No existing tracking scripts on the site — this is a clean installation

You choose the best technical approach (Zaraz, GTM, or combination) and explain your reasoning before starting



What I Need From You



All five pixels installed and verified firing

Conversion events confirmed in each platform's native dashboard

Brief handoff note explaining what was set up and how to add new events in the future



Budget: $100 fixed price

To Apply: Tell me which approach you would use (Zaraz, GTM, or other), why, and whether you have done server-side tracking on WordPress before.

title: Amazon & Walmart Marketplace Specialist
description:
About Us

We are a growing digital marketing agency working with e-commerce brands across multiple industries. We specialize in scaling online sales through strong marketplace strategies, optimized product listings, and data-driven execution. We’re looking for a skilled Amazon & Walmart Marketplace Specialist to help manage, optimize, and grow our clients’ stores.



Role Overview



As an Amazon & Walmart Marketplace Specialist, you will be responsible for creating, optimizing, and managing product listings across Amazon Seller Central and Walmart Seller Center. This role requires hands-on experience with marketplace SEO, listing creation, variation management, and ongoing store optimization to improve visibility, conversions, and sales.



You’ll work closely with our internal marketing and operations team to ensure listings are accurate, optimized, and aligned with brand standards.



Key Responsibilities



Amazon & Walmart Store Management



Create, optimize, and manage product listings on Amazon and Walmart



Set up parent/child variations (size, color, flavor, bundles, etc.)



Manage product uploads via flat files when needed



Ensure listings comply with Amazon and Walmart policies



Listing Optimization (SEO)



Perform keyword research for Amazon and Walmart



Optimize titles, bullet points, descriptions, backend keywords, and attributes



Improve listing structure to increase organic ranking and conversions



Optimize images and coordinate with designers when needed



Catalog & Data Management



Maintain accurate product data (pricing, SKUs, UPCs, attributes)



Fix listing issues, suppressed listings, and catalog errors



Monitor listing health and resolve account or product-level issues



Performance & Ongoing Optimization



Monitor listing performance and identify optimization opportunities



Implement improvements based on marketplace trends and best practices



Support promotions, pricing updates, and seasonal changes



Required Experience & Skills



Proven experience managing Amazon Seller Central



Experience with Walmart Seller Center



Strong understanding of Amazon & Walmart SEO



Experience creating and managing product variations



Knowledge of flat file uploads (preferred)



Familiarity with marketplace policies and compliance
