title: Bilingual Sales Closer — English & Spanish
description:
Bilingual Sales Closer — English & Spanish

Remote | Full-Time | Base + Commission + Monthly Residuals

================================================================



?? TO APPLY: You must include the word "Shield" at the top

of your application. Applications without this word will

not be read. This tests the attention to detail required

for this role



WHO WE ARE

----------

LandlordArmor is a fast-growing compliance protection

company serving landlords and property managers across

California — and expanding nationally. We help landlords

stay protected from tenant lawsuits, government fines, and

legal violations by keeping their documents current, their

notices compliant, and their properties audit-ready at all

times.



California just changed dozens of landlord laws. Most

landlords have no idea. Tenant attorneys do. We are their

shield.



THE ROLE

--------

We are looking for a hungry, bilingual (English + Spanish)

sales closer to join our team remotely. You will call warm

and cold leads — landlords and property managers who are

scared of getting sued — and close them on our compliance

audit and monthly protection plans.



This is NOT a customer service role. This is a sales role.

You will be measured on closes.



WHAT YOU WILL DO

----------------

- Call warm inbound leads who filled out our compliance form

- Follow up on cold outreach targeting LA, San Diego, and

  Inland Empire landlords

- Close landlords on our $799 compliance audit (entry point)

- Upsell clients to $149, $499, or $999 monthly plans

- Conduct calls in English AND Spanish depending on client

- Build relationships with Hispanic landlords in East LA,

  Chula Vista, and the Inland Empire

- Log all activity in CRM and report daily results

- Follow up on cancellation requests and save accounts



WHO YOU ARE

-----------

- Fluent in English AND Spanish — spoken and written

  (REQUIRED — non-negotiable)

- Natural closer — you don't give up at the first objection

- Comfortable discussing legal and compliance topics

- Minimum 1 year phone or video sales experience

- Reliable, self-managed, professional home office setup

- Hungry for commission — you want to earn beyond your base

- Culturally comfortable with US Hispanic business community

- Detail-oriented — compliance is about precision

- Available Mon–Fri, 8am–5pm Pacific Standard Time



WHAT YOU WILL SELL

------------------

Our product solves a real, urgent problem. One wrong

document costs a landlord $7,500–$50,000 in fines.

You are selling them protection.



- $799    47-Point Compliance Audit (one-time entry point)

- $149/mo Essential Protection Plan (1–6 units)

- $499/mo Professional Shield Plan (7–50 units)

- $999/mo Enterprise Armor Plan (50+ units / property mgrs)

- Add-ons: Security Deposit Kit, Spanish Document Package,

           Lease Review



YOUR EARNINGS

-------------

Base Salary:          $800–$1,200/month (guaranteed)

$799 Audit close:     $60 per close (8%)

$149/mo sub close:    $30 one-time + $8/month residual

$499/mo sub close:    $60 one-time + $20/month residual

$999/mo sub close:    $100 one-time + $40/month residual

Upsells:              10% of every upsell sold



STRONG MONTH EXAMPLE:

15 audits + 10 subs closed = $3,400–$3,800

PLUS growing residuals paid every single month



THE RESIDUAL OPPORTUNITY:

Every subscriber you close pays you a residual every month

— even while you sleep. A closer who builds 50 active $499

subscribers earns $1,000/month in residuals alone, on top

of base pay and new commissions. Your income grows

automatically every month you stay with us.



REQUIREMENTS

------------

- Fluent English AND Spanish — written and spoken (required)

- Minimum 1 year phone or video sales experience

- Reliable high-speed internet connection

- Quiet, professional home office

- Available Monday–Friday, 8am–5pm Pacific Time

- Own laptop or desktop computer



NICE TO HAVE

------------

- Experience selling to US landlords or property managers

- Knowledge of California landlord-tenant law

- CRM experience (HubSpot, GoHighLevel, or similar)

- Experience with US compliance, legal, or insurance products



HOW TO APPLY

------------

Your application MUST include all four of the following

or it will not be reviewed:



1. The word "Shield" at the very top of your message

2. 3–5 sentences in ENGLISH explaining why you are the

   right person for this role

3. 3–5 sentences in SPANISH explaining the same thing

4. A voice recording (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself

   in both English and Spanish



Send your application with subject line:

"Bilingual Sales Closer — Shield"



================================================================

— VERSIÓN EN ESPAÑOL —

================================================================



QUIÉNES SOMOS

-------------

LandlordArmor es una empresa de protección y cumplimiento

normativo de rápido crecimiento que sirve a propietarios

y administradores de propiedades en California y en

expansión a nivel nacional. Ayudamos a los propietarios

a estar protegidos contra demandas de inquilinos, multas

gubernamentales y violaciones legales — manteniendo sus

documentos actualizados, sus notificaciones en conformidad

y sus propiedades listas para auditorías en todo 
nto.



California acaba de cambiar docenas de leyes de

arrendadores. La mayoría de los propietarios no lo saben.

Los abogados de inquilinos sí. Nosotros somos su escudo.



EL PUESTO

---------

Buscamos un vendedor/a bilingüe (inglés y español) con

hambre de éxito para unirse a nuestro equipo de forma

remota. Llamarás a clientes potenciales — propietarios y

administradores que tienen miedo de ser demandados — y los

cerrarás en nuestra auditoría de cumplimiento y planes de

protección mensual.



Este NO es un puesto de servicio al cliente. Es un puesto

de ventas. Se te medirá por cierres.



LO QUE HARÁS

------------

- Llamar a clientes que llenaron nuestro formulario

- Dar seguimiento a propietarios en LA, San Diego e

  Inland Empire

- Cerrar propietarios en la auditoría de $799

- Hacer upsell a planes mensuales de $149, $499 o $999

- Realizar llamadas en inglés y español según el cliente

- Construir relaciones con propietarios hispanos en

  East LA, Chula Vista y el Inland Empire

- Registrar actividad en CRM y reportar resultados diarios



TU PERFIL

---------

- Fluido/a en inglés Y español — hablado y escrito

  (REQUISITO — no negociable)

- Cerrador/a natural — no te rindes ante la primera objeción

- Cómodo/a hablando de temas legales y de cumplimiento

- Mínimo 1 año de experiencia en ventas por teléfono/video

- Confiable, puntual y autodisciplinado/a desde casa

- Motivado/a por comisiones — quieres ganar más que tu base

- Cómodo/a culturalmente con la comunidad hispana en EE.UU.

- Orientado/a al detalle — el cumplimiento requiere precisión

- Disponible lunes a viernes, 8am–5pm hora del Pacífico



TUS GANANCIAS

-------------

Salario base:         $800–$1,200/mes (garantizado)

Cierre auditoría $799: $60 por cierre

Cierre sub $149/mes:  $30 + $8/mes de residual

Cierre sub $499/mes:  $60 + $20/mes de residual

Cierre sub $999/mes:  $100 + $40/mes de residual

Upsells:              10?cada venta adicional



LA OPORTUNIDAD DE RESIDUALES:

Cada suscriptor que cierres te paga un residual cada mes

— incluso mientras duermes. Un vendedor que construye

50 suscriptores activos del plan de $499 gana $1,000/mes

en residuales solos, además del salario base y nuevas

comisiones. Tus ingresos crecen cada mes automáticamente.



CÓMO APLICAR

------------

Tu solicitud DEBE incluir los cuatro elementos siguientes

o no será revisada:



1. La palabra "Shield" al principio de tu mensaje

2. 3–5 oraciones en INGLÉS explicando por qué eres

   la persona adecuada para este puesto

3. 3–5 oraciones en ESPAÑOL explicando lo mismo

4. Una grabación de voz (1–2 minutos) presentándote

   en inglés y español



Envía tu solicitud con el asunto:

"Bilingual Sales Closer — Shield"



================================================================



Your Shield Against Tenant Legal Action

Su Escudo Contra Acciones Legales de Inquilinos

============================================

title: Tax Deed Abstractor
description:
A Tax Deed Abstractor is responsible for conducting comprehensive research and analysis on real property records to determine title status, ownership history, outstanding liens, encumbrances, and any issues that may impact the acquisition or sale of tax deed properties. This role requires detailed investigation of county records, legal documents, and public databases to assess risk and ensure accurate due diligence prior to tax deed investment or disposition.

Key Responsibilities

• Perform full title searches for tax deed and tax lien properties, including ownership history, liens, judgments, mortgages, code violations, and municipal assessments.

• Review and analyze recorded documents such as deeds, tax records, probate filings, bankruptcies, and court actions that may affect title transfer.

• Identify title defects, potential clouded title issues, and factors that may impact quiet title actions or post-auction acquisition.

• Prepare clear, concise, and accurate abstract reports summarizing findings for investors, attorneys, or internal decision-makers.

• Monitor county tax sale lists, updates, redemptions, and changes leading up to auction dates.

• Verify legal descriptions, parcel numbers, subdivision data, and chain of title accuracy.

• Communicate with county offices, clerks, assessors, and legal professionals to obtain missing or supplemental documentation.

• Support due diligence for acquisitions by highlighting risks, redemption likelihood, and estimated post-sale requirements.

• Maintain organized records, timelines, and compliance with company procedures and legal standards.

Required Skills & Qualifications

• Strong understanding of tax deed and tax lien processes across multiple counties or states.

• Ability to read and interpret deeds, liens, land records, surveys, and legal descriptions.

• Excellent research and analytical skills with strong attention to detail.

• Familiarity with county online portals, GIS systems, and court databases.

• Ability to summarize complex title issues into clear, actionable reports.

• Strong organizational and time-management skills.

Preferred Experience

• Experience in title research, real estate law, tax deed investing, or related property due diligence.

• Knowledge of quiet title actions and post-auction procedures.

title: Senior Shopify Dropshipping Customer Support (100k+ Store Experience Required)
description:
Senior Shopify Dropshipping Customer Support Specialist

Remote | Part-Time | $7/hour Starting Rate + Bonuses + Growth



We are a fast-growing Shopify dropshipping store operating in the Netherlands and Belgium market.



We are currently scaling aggressively and processing around 60–100 orders per day. Revenue is consistently growing from $4–5k days toward $10k days and beyond.



Because of this growth, we are looking for an experienced customer support specialist who understands how to handle customers in a dropshipping environment while protecting profit.



This role comes with real responsibility and growth opportunities.



This is not a beginner role.



Hard Requirement



You must have worked for one or more dropshipping stores doing at least $100,000 per month in revenue.



Your role in those stores must have involved actively protecting profitability by reducing refunds, handling complaints strategically, and preventing unnecessary losses.



You must be able to prove this experience.



If you have not worked in a real $100k+/month dropshipping store, please do not apply.



Your Main Responsibilities



Handle incoming customer
s via Google Workspace



Respond to all
s within a maximum of 12 hours



Look up order information in Shopify when needed



Handle complaints about shipping times, product expectations, and quality issues



Apply our cashback strategy to protect profit while resolving issues



You will have access to Shopify to check orders and customer information.



Our Refund Strategy



Our standard refund strategy is designed to protect margins while keeping customers satisfied.



10?shback + customer keeps the product

20?shback if needed

Maximum 30?shback without manager approval



If a customer refuses cashback, they are responsible for returning the product to our warehouse in Asia at their own expense and risk.



The goal is always to keep the product with the customer while minimizing refunds.



What We Expect From You



At least 5 years of experience in dropshipping customer support



Experience working with Shopify stores



Ability to handle high
 volume



Strong problem-solving skills with unhappy customers



Ability to guide customers toward solutions that protect the business



We are not looking for agents who simply give full refunds to avoid complaints.



We are looking for someone who understands the business side of customer support.



Compensation and Growth



Starting rate: $7 USD per hour



7-day paid trial period



Salary increases based on performance



Additional bonuses after achieving certain KPI targets



This role offers long-term growth opportunities as the business continues to scale.



Experience Verification (Required)



Your application must include:



The dropshipping stores you worked for (revenue range required)



Your exact responsibilities in those stores



Average number of tickets you handled per day



The refund policy used in those stores



You must be willing to verify your experience via a short video call or recorded explanation.



Applications without proof of real dropshipping experience will not be considered.



Application Instructions



To confirm that you have read this entire job post:



Start your application with the word SCALING.



Then include the required experience information listed above.



Send your application directly to:







At the top of your application, include your preferred contact method (WhatsApp,
, etc.) so we can reach you for an interview.



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.



We are building a serious scaling operation. If you have real experience working in profitable dropshipping stores and understand how to protect margins while handling customers professionally, we look forward to hearing from you.

title: Technical Writer
description:
Description

The Technical Writer will develop and maintain safety-focused documentation that supports our clients and internal stakeholders. This role will be instrumental in writing, editing, and refreshing materials such as safety manuals, documentation, and compliance content. The ideal candidate thrives on accountability, consistently meets deadlines, and contributes to clear and compliant safety communications.



Key Responsibilities:

- Write, edit, and format safety manuals, policies, procedures, and guidance documents.

- Refresh and revise existing documents to ensure accuracy and compliance with current OSHA/HSE standards.

- Draft materials for construction site safety meetings and toolbox talks.

- Prepare clear, concise summaries and follow-ups from safety meetings and client engagements.

- Incorporate regulatory requirements and best practices into content by researching OSHA and industry standards.

- Ensure all documents are delivered with exceptional attention to detail, accurate technical information, consistent terminology, and proper formatting.

- Collaborate with subject-matter experts to validate technical content.

- Prioritize and manage multiple projects concurrently while meeting deadlines.

- Track deliverables to ensure timely completion with minimal revision cycles.



Requirements

- Proven experience as a Technical Writer, preferably with safety, compliance, or industrial content.

- Exceptional written and verbal communication skills.

- strong attention to detail and ability to produce error-free documentation.

- High level of accountability and demonstrated ability to reliably meet deadlines.

- Comfortable multitasking and managing shifting priorities.



Preferred

- Bilingual in Spanish and English

- OSHA 30-Hour Training Certification or equivalent safety training experience.

- Experience writing safety manuals, compliance documentation, or construction-focused materials.

- Familiarity with contractor compliance platforms and requirements.

- Experience working with subject matter experts and translating technical language into clear, user-friendly content.



Minimum Technical and Work Environment Requirements:



Internet Connection:

Primary internet connection with a minimum speed of 15 Mbps.

Backup internet connection with at least 10 Mbps.

Backup connection must be capable of supporting work during a power outage.

Primary Device:

Desktop or laptop equipped with at least:

Intel Core i5 (8th generation or newer), Intel Core i3 (10th generation or newer), AMD Ryzen 5, or an equivalent processor.

A minimum of 8 GB RAM.

Backup Device:

Must meet or exceed the performance of an Intel Core i3 processor.

Must be functional during power interruptions.

A functioning webcam.

A noise-canceling USB headset.

A quiet, dedicated home office space.

Peripherals and Workspace: A smartphone for communication and verification purposes.

++ Track and manage sales activity using CRM tools



Qualifications:

>> Positive, coachable attitude and a willingness to adopt new strategies

>> Highly organized, self-motivated, and goal-driven

>> Must be available to work Eastern Time (ET) hours



If you’re an experienced salesperson who’s open to learning new techniques and enjoys helping clients bring their events to life, we’d love to hear from you. Please include "I am your deal maker" in the subject line of your response.



Also, please answer the following questions:

3. Please share an example of a time when you successfully closed a major deal.

5. How much is your hourly rate?

6. Can you commit in working ET hours?

Citation tools

title: SEMrush Specialist (Remote)
description:
About Us:

gigCMO is a growth consultancy that provides strategic marketing leadership to start-ups, scale-ups, and SMEs. As part of our ongoing efforts to enhance our clients' digital presence and performance, we heavily rely on SEMrush for data-driven insights and strategy development. We are seeking a SEMrush Specialist to manage our SEMrush platform, analyse its data, and provide actionable recommendations to optimise our clients' digital strategies.





Job Summary:

We are looking for an experienced SEMrush Specialist to oversee the management and analysis of SEMrush data, offering insights and recommendations to various internal teams. This role is critical for developing and refining SEO and digital marketing strategies, based on in-depth analysis of SEMrush data. The ideal candidate will be highly proficient in using SEMrush and have a strong understanding of SEO, PPC, and competitive analysis.





Key Responsibilities:



Manage and monitor the SEMrush platform to track SEO performance, keyword rankings, and overall site health for our clients.

Analyse SEMrush data, providing detailed reports on SEO, PPC campaigns, competitor analysis, backlink profiles, and content performance.

Develop and recommend strategies for improving organic search rankings, increasing website traffic, and optimising digital marketing efforts based on SEMrush insights.

Collaborate with content, SEO, and marketing teams to align strategies with SEMrush data, ensuring all digital efforts are data-driven.

Conduct keyword research using SEMrush to identify high-potential keywords and provide recommendations for content optimisation.

Identify and track competitors' activities, providing insights on their strengths and weaknesses using SEMrush competitive analysis tools.

Stay up to date with SEMrush updates, new features, and industry trends to ensure we are maximising the platform's potential.

Generate regular reports on SEMrush performance metrics for different teams, including SEO health, keyword movements, and traffic changes.

Offer training and support to internal teams on SEMrush best practices and usage to ensure everyone is leveraging the platform effectively.

Work with teams to ensure technical SEO issues flagged by SEMrush are addressed and resolved.



Required Skills and Qualifications:



Proven experience in using SEMrush as a core tool for digital marketing analysis and strategy development.

Strong understanding of SEO, PPC, keyword research, and competitive analysis.

Ability to interpret SEMrush data and translate it into actionable insights and strategies.

Experience in creating reports and dashboards that effectively communicate SEMrush findings to various teams.

Familiarity with SEO best practices, on-page optimisation, and technical SEO.

Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to prioritise recommendations based on impact.

Strong communication skills to present data and insights to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.

Familiarity with digital tools like HubSpot, Basecamp, and SharePoint or similar for managing workflows and collaboration.



Preferred Skills:



Experience in SEO strategy development, using SEMrush data as a foundation.

Knowledge of content marketing and its relationship to SEO performance.

Familiarity with Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and other digital marketing tools.

Ability to manage multiple projects and priorities simultaneously in a remote work environment.



Personal Attributes:



Detail-oriented with strong analytical skills.

Proactive in identifying trends and making strategic recommendations.

Self-motivated and able to work independently while collaborating with teams across departments.

Eager to stay up to date with the latest SEO trends, SEMrush updates, and digital marketing innovations.



Application Process:

This role requires full-time commitment. To apply, please fill out the form using this link: 



Note: Only successful candidates will be contacted for interviews.



Compensation: Php 30,000 (depending on whether the applicant meets 100% of the requirements)

title: Senior Data Analyst (Freelance)
description:
About Surface Scan



Surface Scan is a specialist 3D scanning, reverse engineering, and 3D printing service based in Ramsgate, Kent. We work with clients across a wide range of industries, helping them solve complex engineering challenges using cutting-edge technology. We’ve been growing steadily, but we know we’re sitting on years of valuable data that we’re not making the most of. We need someone who can change that.



The Opportunity



We have years of data spread across multiple platforms – Google Analytics, Google Search Console, Google Ads, Zoho CRM, Xero, our
 marketing platform, our online ordering system, and more. 



We’re looking for a Data Analyst who can dig into what we already have, surface the insights we’ve been missing, and then help us build the systems and processes to make data-driven decision-making a permanent part of how we operate. This is a genuinely exciting opportunity for someone who loves getting stuck into messy, real-world data and turning it into something actionable.



This is a freelance position to start, with flexible hours and full remote working. We see this as a long-term relationship with a clear path to scaling up hours and pay as we grow together and the value becomes clear – which we’re confident it will.



What You’ll Be Doing



Unlocking Our Existing Data



• Diving into years of historical data across GA4, Search Console, Google Ads, Zoho CRM, Xero, our
 platform, and our online ordering system to find meaningful patterns, trends, and insights we’ve been missing.

• Identifying opportunities for growth – whether that’s untapped customer segments, underperforming channels, revenue patterns, cost inefficiencies, or gaps in our sales funnel.

• Connecting data across platforms to build a complete picture of how our marketing, sales, and operations are actually performing – not just in isolation, but end to end.

• Presenting findings in a clear, practical way that non-technical tea
mbers can understand and act on. We don’t need a data dump – we need “here’s what this means, and here’s what we should do about it.”



Building the Right Systems Going Forward



• Auditing our current tracking and analytics setup across all platforms, identifying gaps, and ensuring we’re capturing everything we should be.

• Setting up robust attribution so we can confidently trace leads and revenue back to their source – understanding what’s actually driving results, not guessing.

• Recommending and implementing tools, integrations, or process changes that will improve our data quality and make ongoing analysis more effective.

• Future-proofing our setup so that as we add new services, platforms, or marketing channels, we’re tracking from day one.



Dashboards & Reporting



• Creating Looker Studio dashboards that the team can use day-to-day and in meetings – clear, visual, and built around the KPIs that actually matter for each department.

• Delivering regular reports with insights and recommendations, not just numbers. We want someone who tells us what the data means and what action to take.

• Helping us define and track the right KPIs across marketing, sales, and operations, and making it easy to compare performance across departments.



Strategic Input



• Working closely with the Marketing Manager and Founders to inform business decisions with data – from marketing spend allocation to service expansion, pricing, and beyond.

• Proactively flagging opportunities or risks as you spot them, rather than waiting to be asked.

• Helping the wider team develop a stronger data culture – making sure insights are understood, trusted, and used.



What We’re Looking For



We want someone who is as comfortable asking the right questions as they are finding the answers. You should be able to take a tangled web of data from multiple sources and turn it into clear, actionable insight.



You should have:



• Strong experience working with analytics and reporting tools, particularly GA4, Google Search Console, Google Ads, and Looker Studio.

• Experience working with CRM data (Zoho or similar) and understanding how to connect marketing activity to sales outcomes.

• A solid understanding of attribution modelling and the ability to build reliable tracking across multiple channels and touchpoints.

• The ability to work across multiple data sources and join the dots to produce a unified view of business performance.

• Excellent communication skills – you can present complex data in a way that’s clear, concise, and focused on what matters.

• A proactive, self-directed approach. You’ll be working remotely with a lot of autonomy – we need someone who takes ownership and delivers without needing to be chased.

• A commercial mindset. We’re not looking for someone who just reports numbers – we want someone who thinks about what the data means for the business and makes recommendations accordingly.



Nice to have:



• Experience with Xero or other accounting platforms, and the ability to incorporate financial data into performance analysis.

• Familiarity with SQL, APIs, or scripting for more advanced data extraction and manipulation.

• Experience in e-commerce, service-based businesses, or B2B environments.

• Experience setting up or auditing tracking implementations (GTM, conversion tracking, event setup).



Tools & Platforms



You’ll be working across the following (with more likely to be added as we grow):



• Google Analytics 4

• Google Search Console

• Google Ads

• Looker Studio

• Zoho CRM

• Xero

•
 marketing platform

• Online ordering / quoting system



Why Surface Scan?



• A genuine greenfield opportunity. You won’t be maintaining someone else’s dashboards – you’ll be building the entire analytics function from the ground up.

• Real impact. The insights you uncover will directly shape business decisions, marketing strategy, and growth.

• Years of untapped data to explore. If you’re the kind of person who gets excited about digging into a rich dataset and finding what everyone else has missed, this is your playground.

• A growing business with ambitious plans. As we scale, so does this role – there’s a clear path to increased hours, pay, and responsibility.

• Full remote working with flexible hours and a team that values results over presenteeism.



How to Apply



To apply, please
 the following to 



• Your CV.

• A cover letter telling us why this role interests you and what you’d bring to Surface Scan.

• Any relevant sample work you think we should see – dashboards, reports, case studies, or anything else that demonstrates your approach and capabilities.

The Growth Consultant is a leading business consulting company that helps entrepreneurs streamline operations, strengthen internal systems, and reduce daily workload so they can focus on growth and scaling. We support fast-paced, service-based businesses by building efficient workflows, maintaining accurate records, and providing reliable operational support.



As our healthcare and insurance-focused partners continue to expand, we are growing our support team to ensure client communication remains responsive, professional, and organized across all channels.



Job Summary:

We are seeking a Customer Service & Social Media Support Specialist who will be responsible for managing inbound client inquiries, maintaining professional communication across multiple channels, and supporting the company’s social media presence. This role also includes essential back-office administrative support to ensure daily operations run smoothly.



This position is ideal for someone who is customer-focused, highly organized, tech-savvy, and comfortable communicating in a healthcare or insurance-related environment. The ideal candidate is empathetic, detail-oriented, and confident handling both client-facing communication and administrative responsibilities in a remote setup.



Key Responsibilities:

Customer Service

- Respond to inbound inquiries via phone,
, and social media platforms

- Assist clients with general questions regarding services, coverage, and processes

- Provide clear, professional, and empathetic communication at all times

- Escalate complex or sensitive concerns to appropriate tea
mbers

- Maintain accurate notes and detailed records of all client interactions



Social Media Support

- Monitor and respond to comments and direct messages in a timely manner

- Schedule and publish approved content

- Support engagement initiatives to increase online visibility and responsiveness

- Coordinate with leadership regarding messaging, branding, and communication tone



Back Office Administrative Support

- Maintain and update CRM and client records accurately

- Assist with data entry and documentation management

- Support reporting, follow-ups, and coordination between departments

- Ensure all client files and records are organized, complete, and up to date



Requirements:

- 1–3 years of experience in customer service (healthcare or insurance experience preferred)

- Strong written and verbal English communication skills

- Experience handling social media engagement professionally

- Highly organized, detail-oriented, and dependable

- Comfortable using CRM systems and administrative tools

- Ability to multitask in a fast-paced environment

- Professional remote work setup with a reliable internet connection



We Offer:

Fully remote position

13th-month pay

Annual salary increases

Supportive and collaborative work environment

Opportunities for long-term growth within the company

title: Social Media Marketing Specialist (Full-Time, Long-Term)
description:
================================================================================

ABOUT ENTVAS TECHNOLOGY

================================================================================



Entvas Technology is a US-based custom software development and technology consulting company headquartered in St. Petersburg, Florida. We specialize in building AI-ready, end-to-end business systems for growing companies.



We help businesses transition from scattered, disconnected tools to unified, custom platforms that streamline operations and prepare them for the AI-driven future. 



We're a small but growing team that values initiative, clear communication, and people who take ownership of their work.



================================================================================

THE OPPORTUNITY

================================================================================



We're looking for a Social Media Marketing Specialist who can own our entire social media presence—from strategy to execution. This isn't a "just post content" role. We need someone who thinks like a marketer, understands lead generation, and can connect social media efforts to real business results.



You'll be the person driving our brand visibility, creating engaging content, and building systems that generate qualified leads for a B2B technology company.



If you're someone who gets excited about creating content strategies that actually work, analyzing what's performing, and continuously improving—we want to hear from you.



================================================================================

WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING

================================================================================



STRATEGY & PLANNING

- Develop and execute social media strategies aligned with business goals

- Create monthly content calendars across all platforms

- Research industry trends, competitors, and audience behavior

- Plan campaigns that drive traffic, engagement, and lead generation

- Track performance metrics and adjust strategies based on data



CONTENT CREATION

- Design eye-catching graphics for social media posts (LinkedIn,
, Instagram, X/Twitter)

- Write compelling copy that speaks to business decision-makers

- Adapt content for different platforms and audiences

- Maintain consistent brand voice and visual identity



COMMUNITY & ENGAGEMENT

- Manage daily posting and engagement across all platforms

- Respond to comments, messages, and mentions professionally

- Build relationships with followers and industry connections

- Identify opportunities for brand visibility and thought leadership



REPORTING & OPTIMIZATION

- Monitor analytics and report on key performance indicators

- A/B test content to improve engagement rates

- Provide insights and recommendations based on performance data

- Stay current with platform algorithm changes and best practices



================================================================================

REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

================================================================================



MUST HAVE:

- 2+ years of experience in social media marketing (B2B experience strongly preferred)

- Proven track record of growing social media accounts and driving engagement

- Strong graphic design skills using Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator) OR Canva Pro

- Excellent written English communication skills

- Strategic thinking ability—you understand HOW social media drives business results

- Experience creating content calendars and executing consistently

- Portfolio showing your design work and content examples

- Reliable internet connection and dedicated workspace



NICE TO HAVE (Big Plus):

- Video content creation and editing experience (Reels, short-form video)

- Paid social media advertising experience 
 Ads, LinkedIn Ads)

- Experience with AI tools for content creation (ChatGPT, Midjourney, etc.)

- Experience marketing for technology, software, or professional services companies

- Basic understanding of SEO and how social media supports organic search

- Experience with social media management tools (Buffer, Hootsuite, Later, etc.)



================================================================================

WORK SCHEDULE & ARRANGEMENT

================================================================================



- Full-time: 40 hours per week

- US time zone overlap required: You must be available during US Eastern Time business hours for at least 4-5 hours daily (we can discuss exact schedule)

- This may mean working evenings or early mornings Philippine time

- Long-term position with opportunity for growth

- You'll communicate primarily via Slack and video calls



================================================================================

WHAT WE OFFER

================================================================================



- Competitive salary: $800 - $1,200/month (up to $1,500 for exceptional candidates with strong portfolios)

- Long-term, stable position with a growing US company

- Direct collaboration with company leadership

- Opportunity to shape and own our entire social media strategy

- Room for professional growth as the company expands

- Paid Philippine holidays (negotiable)

- Performance-based salary increases



================================================================================

HOW TO APPLY

================================================================================



To apply, please send:



1. YOUR RESUME - highlighting relevant social media and marketing experience



2. PORTFOLIO - links to:

   - Social media accounts you've managed (or screenshots if confidential)

   - Examples of graphics/content you've created

   - Any campaign results or metrics you can share



3. COVER LETTER answering these questions:

   - Why are you interested in working with a B2B technology company?

   - What's one social media campaign you're proud of and why did it work?

   - What's your availability for US time zone overlap?

   - What is your expected salary within our range?



4. SHORT VIDEO (optional but highly recommended to get recognized):

   - 1-2 minute video introducing yourself

   - Tell us about your experience and why you'd be a great fit

   - This helps us see your communication style and personality



================================================================================

IMPORTANT NOTES

================================================================================



- Please include "SMM Specialist - [Your Name]" in your application subject line

- Applications without a portfolio will not be considered

- We will conduct a paid test task for shortlisted candidates

- We're looking to hire quickly but will take time to find the right person



We're excited to find someone who wants to grow with us. If you're strategic, creative, reliable, and ready to own this role—apply now!
